programme.title: Maximum Foodie S1 - "Thailand: US Thai Food vs Authentic-Thai, which is the winner?"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Thailand: US Thai Food vs Authentic-Thai, which is the winner?
programme.desc: Liesel embarks on a journey to the country of over 7000 islands, the Philippines. From the serene to the seedy, she combs through metro Manila discovering the food; this culinary spectrum includes bouncing around trying the popular fast food joints, meeting the local experts such as blogger Cheryl Tiu, a taste of history at the world's oldest Chinatown, an unexpected dancing session at the Spanish haunts of Manila, to rubbing shoulders with the elite Chefs of the city. All in a quest to answer just why Filipino cuisine is unheard of!

programme.title: Travel Quest S1 - "Mongolia"
programme.desc: There is nothing on earth that compares to Mongolia. Here the last nomadic people range their livestock over millions of acres of grasslands. Drinking fermented mare’s milk (worst tasting drink ever), riding a yak and finding the original wild horses

programme.title: Travel Quest S1 - "North Pole"
programme.desc: The crew takes an icebreaker to the North Pole just in time to make a satellite phone call to wish Bill's mother a happy birthday (she is so shocked she doesn't recognize him). We also track and film the biggest predators on earth…polar bears.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Three Kings Redemption"
programme.desc: After a break of dawn beach launch off the tip of 90 Mile Beach, the team punch north to the legendary Three Kings Islands, home to dozens of record calibre fish, and in the process, bag a couple of new records for themselves.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "The Rock"
programme.desc: The Spearo team are in the deep South this week, departing Bluff for a couple of days diving the pristine waters of Stewart Island, but will the brief weather window allow them to make the notorious steam all the way to remote Solander Island?

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Far North Bluewater Mission"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Far North Bluewater Mission
programme.desc: 60 nautical miles + 200kg of Burley divided by 3 keen spearos = mayhem. The team go wide this week, overnighting aboard The Orca in 1000m of water in the Far North, in an attempt to create a 24-hour trail capable of attracting in who knows what!

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Wakomata Lake Cottages"
programme.desc: Colin McKeown and friend Terry Loates visit the Algoma region of Northern Ontario to fish for early season smallmouth bass.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Wind River"
programme.desc: Jenna McKeown explores the small streams in and around Wind River, a region famous for beautiful landscape and great trout fishing.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Anderson's Lodge"
programme.desc: Mark Melynk is fly fishing for feisty smallmouth bass but deals with difficult weather. He uses a series of different fly fishing techniques to be successful.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Palisades Idaho"
programme.desc: Mark Melnyk explores some of the great small streams and rivers in this beautiful region of Yellowstone Teton Territory.

programme.title: Wardens S5 - "Case Closed"
programme.desc: The illegal killing of multiple animals over the past 5 years by a family of poachers is going to trial. Wardens on on the witness stand hoping for a guilty verdict and a Case Closed.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Law Dodgers"
programme.desc: Region 4 Warden Bryan Golie chases down hunters that dodged a game check station. A nearly four hour investigation reveals exactly what they were hiding.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Crying Shame"
programme.desc: Region 5 Warden Nick Taylor is in the crosshairs when a hunter points a gun directly at him. And in Region 2 Wardens find a huntress with a secret she is hiding.

programme.title: Police Patrol S1 - "BORDER POLICE PATROLS"
programme.desc: Ciudad Juárez, a key Mexico–USA border city, is a major route for migrants seeking a better life. Mexican Federal Police special forces patrol the area to prevent illegal crossings and suspicious activity.

programme.title: Police Patrol S1 - "ISLAND POLICE PATROLS"
programme.desc: To curb violence in Tananarive, Madagascar, a rapid-response police unit was formed. Meanwhile, a special team patrols Reunion Island nightly to keep security on this island paradise.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S2 - "Hanging by a Thread"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Hanging by a Thread
programme.desc: Tanalian Aviation bush pilots Joel and Josiah earn their keep slinging a stranded snow machine.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S2 - "Into the Deep"
programme.desc: The bush pilots have to use all their skills - scuba diving, underwater rigging and expert flying - to try and salvage a de Havilland Beaver wing at the bottom of the 6 Mile Lake.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S2 - "Flying High"
programme.desc: The Tanalian bush pilots transport extreme paragliders to Moose Creek, in the Talkeetna Range, for a once-in-a-lifetime airbone experience.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Iraqi Sniper Attack"
programme.desc: On deployment in Anbar Province, Marine Corp Master Sergeant Buck Doyle throws himself in harm's way to save a fallen comrade from an Iraqi sniper and becomes a target himself. This is a story of survival on and off the battlefield.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Lightning Strike"
programme.desc: A bass fishing trip goes horribly wrong when a bolt of lightning strikes their boat, leaving Seventeen-year-old Christian Neal burned and unconscious and his father Gabe blown into the water and paralyzed. It will take a miracle to save them.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Mountain Lion Attack"
programme.desc: Marine Anne Hjelle was mountain biking when she was ripped off her bike by a mountain lion. Anne fought back even as the big cat shredded her face in its jaws. Surviving the attack was only the beginning of Anne’s incredible fight to survive.

programme.title: Survival Science S1 - "Sniper Attack"
programme.desc: Military snipers are trained in a variety of skills: detection, stalking, camouflage, infiltration, special reconnaissance and target acquisition. Bottom line, a ton of cool shooting and science for Nick and Laura to explore!

programme.title: Survival Science S1 - "Surviving a Lightning Strike"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Surviving a Lightning Strike
programme.desc: Laura and Nick travel to a state-of-the-art Direct Effects Lightning Test Lab. With some “explosive” experiments, they’ll determine the power lightning and how it behaves? And they’ll find out how can hunters and fishermen best protect themselves?

programme.title: Survival Science S1 - "Surviving Nature’s Fury – Storms"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Surviving Nature’s Fury – Storms
programme.desc: Nick and Laura experience Nature’s fury through storm amazing generating gear that simulates terrible hurricanes, ice cold winds and even tornados. For these experiments they’ll use remarkable technology that creates massive storms on Hollywood sets.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "WE ARE BOTTOM FEEDERS"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 WE ARE BOTTOM FEEDERS
programme.desc: Jedd is tough on his crew while fishing is tough out on the water. Mike and his brother try their luck in the icy waters of Wisconsin, and the fishing has been rough for Tim and his crew.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "NEVER GIVE UP"
programme.desc: Mike Johnson and his son keep looking towards tomorrow for that big haul and Tim Adams and his crew face their own unique challenges out on the water.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "IDENTITY CRISIS"
programme.desc: It's the first week of April in the upper midwest. Our fisherman are looking for record setting hauls while market is still high.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Arctic Lodge"
programme.desc: Phil Rowley flies to Northern Saskatchewan to fly fish for big lake trout, northern pike and aggressive arctic grayling on a fly.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Esnagami Lake Lodge"
programme.desc: Mikey Metcalfe visit this famous lodge for the first time, fishing for wild brook trout and northern pike on a fly.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Gander River Outfitters"
programme.desc: Host Mark Melnyk travels to Newfoundland in search of big Atlantic Salmon.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Illegal Possession"
programme.desc: Region 3 Wardens chase down a check station runner only to find the hunters have shot a deer – but what and where is the question?

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Under Fire"
programme.desc: The drought conditions in Montana threaten to close down hunting and fishing in the Treasure State. But dead fish and restrictions are the least of the Warden's worries when the Bears come to town.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "False Witness"
programme.desc: Block Management is one of the keys to great hunting in Montana but the rules are set. If you are going to break them the Wardens will be there to hold you accountable.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S1 - "Alpine Ghosts"
programme.desc: Mario takes on the unforgiving alpine mountains of the South Island of New Zealand in a grueling fallow deer hunt with his bow just at the end of the rut and cooks an impressive masterpiece venison pie dish on the same antler of the deer he harvests.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S1 - "Deadly Outback"
programme.desc: We are in the outback of Australia. It’s the Monsoon season. Mario links up with longtime friend in search of a wild Buffalo, he attempts to cook an amazing South American inspired dish in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S1 - "Up with the Gods"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Up with the Gods
programme.desc: Mario teams up with good friend and precision rifle expert Bernard and heads into the high alpine mountains above New Zealand’s rugged West Coast in search of tahr. Drawing on his Greek roots, Mario cooks a rustic “Kleftiko” dish in an earth oven.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S2 - "On Thin Ice"
programme.desc: On a rare day off, Josiah and his friends white water raft where few have gone before - on top of the massive Knik Glacier.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Hardcore Hapuka"
programme.desc: We return to Fiordland in the hope of going one step better in slotting a hapuka on a spear, but the presence of Bluefin Tuna off the coast, and Wapiti Bulls on the slip faces proves a tempting distraction from the task at hand!

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Pitt Island Expedition"
programme.desc: Following a ridiculous sequence of events in Fiordland, the team saddle up and head for the hapuka haven of the Chatham Islands, where they spend a few days diving the spectacular & remote Pitt Island.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Southern Bluefin Tuna Epic"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Southern Bluefin Tuna Epic
programme.desc: After hearing reports of massive schools of southern bluefin tuna out of Milford Sound, Tim, Jordy, Kieran, Sam and Dave saddle up and try their luck, but a gear malfunction right in the heat of the moment threatens to seriously burst their bubble.

programme.title: Emergency S1 - "Religious Fervour"
programme.desc: Massive crowds gather at Allahabad’s Maha Kumbh Mela and Manila’s Black Nazarene, creating major healthcare challenges. Thousands of medical personnel and volunteers are deployed to keep people safe.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Soul Of A Survivor"
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 Soul Of A Survivor
programme.desc: Craig DeMartino examines the stories of other survivors he’s met across the season. Their survival stories are all different, but Craig discovers that these survivors share more in common than you might think.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Rainy Lake"
programme.desc: Mark Melnyx is in Sunset Country on the hunt for Bass and Pike on the fly.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Libby's Camp"
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Frozen Fire"
programme.desc: When a report of an illegal buck surfaces Warden Joe Kambic goes to work to find the shooters. Things heat up for Warden Rick Smauch when he responds to a fire, and Bryan Golie fights the winter weather just to patrol his area.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "River Rescue"
programme.desc: Drownings happen every Summer on Montana's rivers and lakes. Region 1 Warden Chris Crane steps in to save a kayaker while Region 2 Wardens catch friends fishing in the wrong spot.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S1 - "Outback Odyssey"
programme.desc: Mario Kalpou travels to the outback desert of Australia in search of feral camels that have been running rampant. With a bow in hand and scorching heat he explores the Great Dividing Range, hoping to harvest one of these middle eastern based beasts.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S1 - "Volcanic Kingfish"
programme.desc: Mario hooks up with old friend and current world record holder for kingfish Rick Pollock. They fish the coast of New Zealand just off a live Volcano, then tragedy strikes. After the Volcano erupts Mario prepares an amazing ceviche dish.

programme.title: Madfin Shark Series S1 - "Day Two Pt.2"
programme.desc: Day two & the battle continues on the Madfin Shark Series. Four of our 2-man teams are catching & releasing the biggest & most dangerous sharks they can for the most points they can accrue. After today, one team will be sent home & eliminated.

programme.title: Madfin Shark Series S1 - "Day Three Pt. 1"
programme.desc: It's the third and final day of competition for the remaining 3 teams in this intense shark tournament. See how the first half of the day turns out.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass S1 - "Shallow Grass Lake Florida Bass"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Shallow Grass Lake Florida Bass
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in the shallow grass lakes of these southwest Florida watershed areas.

programme.title: Emergency S1 - "Big Cities"
programme.desc: Osaka, Japan, struggles with increasing emergency calls from its aging population. In fast-paced Greater Mexico City, home to 20 million people, medical services face overwhelming demand.

programme.title: Emergency S1 - "National Day"
programme.desc: In Israel, back-to-back Memorial and Independence Days put heavy demands on Magen David Adom. In Belgium, the July 21 national holiday draws over 200,000 people, triggering a surge in medical emergencies.

programme.title: Emergency S1 - "Ibiza"
programme.desc: Ibiza’s medical services face heavy strain during tourist season, often due to late-night excesses. In Thailand, nurses work tirelessly at the Full Moon Party to keep international revelers safe.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Bay of Islands Exploration"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Bay of Islands Exploration
programme.desc: The fellas set off to tick a box for rookie spearo Ants, aiming to bag him his first ever kingfish, before shifting focus to landing a few more prized fish in some stunning Bay of Islands blue water, but as it doesn't all go according to plan!

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "South Minerva Reef"
programme.desc: The team embark on their biggest mission to date, an expedition to the remote and revered Minerva Reefs, where they encounter the most incredible diving conditions they've ever experienced, but also, a thriving population of voracious sharks!

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "North Minerva Reef"
programme.desc: After punching their way to North Minerva, the fellas continue their quest to land a big pelagic, but the local toothies threaten to throw a spanner into the team’s plans. Can they bag a tropical trophy, or will the sharks rain on their parade?

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Valley Fishing Guides"
programme.desc: Stillwater Expert Phil Rowley travels to Canada's West Coast on the hunt for trout.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Bowmans Island Charters"
programme.desc: Hosts Mark Melnyk and Jack Imhof travel to Ontario's Sunset Country to find big trout.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Camp Grayling"
programme.desc: Jenna McKeown and Mikey Metcalfe team up in Saskatchewan to fish for the prized Arctic Grayling and some big pike.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Death Valley"
programme.desc: Something is killing deer in the Missoula Valley and it has FWP working overtime to find the culprit.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Careless Endeavors"
programme.desc: Opening weekend mayhem has wardens running from one call to the next. But not all violations are negligence.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Grey Ghost"
programme.desc: Wardens get a tip about grey pickup shooting a deer at night; but even joining forces they have a tough time tracking down the Grey Ghost.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "Foggy Goose Hunts"
programme.desc: Together with her Dad, Stefanie runs DK WAI, a danish hunting store focusing on goose hunting. Join them on an early morning to go regulate the numbers and get the geese off the farmers field, saving his crop.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "Chef Nikolaj in Denmark"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Chef Nikolaj in Denmark
programme.desc: Rock Star, Chef, Hunter, Cookbook author, Father, Fisherman, and the titles go on! Nikolaj transforms his raw materials into simple and delicious dishes.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "The Ducks of Venice"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 The Ducks of Venice
programme.desc: Follow in the footsteps of Hemmingway and visit the son of a famous duck decoy maker, who made all of Hemmingway's decoys, and shared many mornings in the lagoon with the famed American Author.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 1"
programme.desc: Anthony strives to prove himself as medical lead responding to a snowmobile crash on Togwotee Pass.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 2"
programme.desc: The first priority of every mission is team safety, so when conditions on Pyramid Peak threaten Jake and Cody during a rescue, Tim demands they pump the breaks.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 3"
programme.desc: Jake and Marilynn cancel a dinner party so they can respond to an injured skier on Teton Pass.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S1 - "Mountain Monsters"
programme.desc: Mario is on the search of the outer limits of the mountains to find himself a monster red deer. His arrow successfully finds a big red and he showcases some recipes he learnt from the southern regions of Italy.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S1 - "Boars and Prehistoric Fish"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Boars and Prehistoric Fish
programme.desc: Mario returns to his homeland in Australia to help a friend out, but drama strikes and Mario finds himself in crocodile infested water plucking fish out with his bare hands.All these delicious bush treats are prepared in a termite oven made by Mario.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S1 - "Birds of a Feather"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Mario enjoys the camaraderie and challenge of duck hunting on opening day and then teaches the audience how to cook an ancient Chinese recipe with one of the leading chefs of an award-winning restaurant from New Zealand.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "THE NEW GENERATION"
programme.desc: Everyone deals with harsh conditions as Mike and his son work a tough Lake Pepin, Jedd and his father can't seem to see eye to eye in Wisconsin and Tim heads out with a first timer only to come up pretty much empty handed.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "WIN SOME,LOSE SOME"
programme.desc: It's the last week of March and a warm spring has upset typical fish patterns and our experienced commercial fishermen are struggling to adjust.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "FAMILY TIES"
programme.desc: It's late spring in the upper midwest and our commercial fishermen continue to endure a difficult season. The unpredictable and erratic weather conditions are an opportunity for crews to pull together.

programme.title: Dropped S1 - "Edge of the Earth"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Edge of the Earth
programme.desc: The first episode sets the stage for Chris and Casey's journey, detailing the terrain, weather, and hunting style they'll encounter. It also delves into the project's backstory and it's initiation.

programme.title: Dropped S1 - "On Top of the World"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 On Top of the World
programme.desc: Chris and Casey traverse waterways, muskeg, and mountains hunting a huge caribou bull. Chris hurts his knee, questioning his endurance.

programme.title: Dropped S1 - "The River Migration"
programme.desc: The duo journeys downriver hunting Yukon Bull Moose, covering nearly 20 miles in two days. They establish moose camp despite an unsettling encounter with a nearby grizzly.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Yellowstone Idaho"
programme.desc: Host Mark Melnyk continues his RV fishing Adventures in Idaho.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Scott Lake Lodge"
programme.desc: Mark Melnyk braves tough conditions in Northern Saskatchewan searching for giant Lake Trout.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "Bruce Bay Cottages & Lighthouse"
programme.sub-title: S17 : E22 Bruce Bay Cottages & Lighthouse
programme.desc: Host Colin McKeown is in Algoma Country this week, catching Bass on the fly.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Dump Site"
programme.desc: Region 4 Wardens find a deer in the dumpster, multiple deer dumped along side the road and a deer left by a trespasser. It's all in a long days work!

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Hidden Truth"
programme.desc: When Wardens stop a truck the first of November with Christmas trees in the back they know something is being hidden. Most likely the truth!

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Yellowfin Mission"
programme.desc: Word's gotten out about some massive yellowfin baitballs, so the team head out in search of more tuna glory. Dwane, Kieran, Sam and Dave then bounce over the ditch for a few days diving the stunning waters of the Great Barrier Reef.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Lucinda Sky with Diamonds"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Lucinda Sky with Diamonds
programme.desc: The lads try their luck at getting a spear into one of the quintessential Australian fish species - the barramundi. Problem is, these 'barra' inhabit the same waters as a couple of other less welcome locals - saltwater crocodiles and bull sharks!

programme.title: Madfin Shark Series S1 - "Day Three Pt.2"
programme.desc: Day three continues at Hurricane Hole Marina in Key West, FL. Our three remaining 2-man teams are doing everything they can to find, catch & release the biggest sharks they can for points with only one goal in mind, bring home the trophy & the title.

programme.title: Madfin Shark Series S1 - "Day Three Begins"
programme.desc: Day three ends at Hurricane Hole Marina in Key West, Florida, on the Madfin Shark Series & there can bo only one Madfin Shark Champion.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S2 - "Man Eating Crocs"
programme.desc: Mario risks it all by rafting down the deadliest strip of water in Africa, the Zambezi River, towards lake Kariba, only to find himself in front of some of the biggest and baddest problematic man-eating crocodiles on the planet.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S2 - "Namibian Desert Onyx"
programme.desc: Mario was told by locals that deep in the Namibian desert there is an odd-looking creature that is great nutritional value that has been harvested by people for hundreds of years.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "SUMMER"
programme.desc: This time of year is usually a time for commercial fishermen to think about vacation but due to a poor spring, Mike, Tim, Jedd and their crews are fishing well into summer.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "NEW BEGINNINGS IN AUTUMN"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 NEW BEGINNINGS IN AUTUMN
programme.desc: As the season changes from summer to fall, change is also in store for our commercial fishermen. One man is just starting out, one is barely getting by, and one is looking to start over.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 4"
programme.desc: The team battles high winds in the heli to save a snowmobiler with a busted femur.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 5"
programme.desc: Unprecedented three rescues in under twelve hours.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S17 - "East Coast Anglers"
programme.desc: Rob Heal heads to New Brunswick to fish for Striped Bass.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Back Country"
programme.desc: Wardens do way more than just drive around in trucks and check licenses. This week the region one wardens go off grid to protect Montana's natural resources.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Double Kill"
programme.desc: Region 5 has a rash of illegal elk kills and it's up to the Wardens to investigate the Double Kills.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Hot Mess"
programme.desc: Wardens gear up for the last week of the season. The pressure is on, putting the Wardens right in the middle of a Hot Mess.

programme.title: Dropped S1 - "Night Stalkers"
programme.desc: Exhausted and famished, the brothers persist downstream, barely mustering energy to set camp. They find abundant signs of moose and favorable terrain for their habitat.

programme.title: Dropped S1 - "Exploration Camp"
programme.desc: Days pass, moose elusive since Day 11. Restless nights with lurking creatures. They find an abandoned trapper's cabin, home to a huge grizzly.

programme.title: Dropped S1 - "Prayer Point 2"
programme.desc: On the third day of river travel, the crew desperately seeks a hunting camp to lift morale and pursue the giant bull. Frustration mounts as the brothers confess uncertainty for the first time.

programme.title: Survivorman S3 - "Episode 01"
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S2 - "Kalahari Bushmen"
programme.desc: In the Kalahari Desert is an ancient tribe that has lived off the land since the beginning of man kind. These people are known as the Naru bushman.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S2 - "Untouched Atols"
programme.desc: Just off the coast of Africa is a strip of 115 islands called the Seychelles. Originally claimed by France in the 1700s most of the population speak French and the influence is felt in its cuisine.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S2 - "Heartbreak Tuna Capetown"
programme.desc: When two oceans collide, there is mayhem on the horizon. On this episode Mario ventures off the coast of Cape Town where the Indian ocean meets the Atlantic.

programme.title: Survival Science S1 - "Surviving a Mountain Lion Attack"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Surviving a Mountain Lion Attack
programme.desc: Laura and Nick explore the techniques to deal with these apex predators when they are the most dangerous. We’ll scientifically breakdown the behaviors, strength, eyesight and speed of mountain lions through outrageous experiments, in day and night.

programme.title: Survival Science S1 - "LOST!"
programme.desc: Nick and Laura head deep into the mountains to explore survival techniques that go far beyond anything they’ve learned before. Our courageous hosts subject themselves to intense survival training with the Survival Training School of California.

programme.title: Survival Science S1 - "ATV Accidents"
programme.desc: ATVs have allowed us to penetrate the wilderness like never before. But they’ve also made the backcountry a bit more dangerous. Laura and Nick rig up some dramatic, high-speed tests to see how accidents happen and what you can do to protect yourself.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 6"
programme.desc: Jamie puts his trust in new explosives technology.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 7"
programme.desc: A young snowmobiler's first ride into the backcountry spins out of control.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 8"
programme.desc: Tim demands a lot of everyone around him, especially during a cave rescue - what he describes as "the worst kind of rescue possible".

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "Danish Dynamite & The Boar"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Danish Dynamite & The Boar
programme.desc: Mette is a personal trainer in one of Copenhagen's best gyms. She is also a hunter. Challenge the stereotypical "old white men" hunter image, and the paradox of the young female urbanite.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "The Italian Hare"
programme.desc: Travel back to the Apennine Mountains in Italy and join a hare hunt all the way up and above the clouds.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Long Day"
programme.desc: When elk start to migrate the days get long. Wardens keep an eye on the herd and find that at night it really gets weird.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Bad Decisions"
programme.desc: Ethical hunters make the right decisions every day. This week Wardens find themselves confronted with Bad Decisions.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Fly By"
programme.desc: Wardens set up a check station in Region 5. When the hunters decide to run it the chase is on.

programme.title: Dropped S1 - "King of the Tundra"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 King of the Tundra
programme.desc: Casey downs a huge bull near the river. Another bull approaches, leading to a tense standoff across the river.

programme.title: Dropped S1 - "The Day After"
programme.desc: On the heels of killing a giant bull, Chris and Casey get the 1500 pound moose quartered just before darkness falls and build a meat cache to preserve food rations for the rest of the journey.

programme.title: Dropped S1 - "Return Home"
programme.desc: Casey's bull speeds downstream, out of sight. Anticipation rises as they round the bend. Chris spots it washed up near white water on a gravel flat.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "WORLDS COLLIDE"
programme.desc: The rough season is starting to wear on commercial fishermen. For some, hard feelings are boiling to the surface and others turn imagination into money.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "FISHING IS NOT FAIR"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 FISHING IS NOT FAIR
programme.desc: The desire and competition for catching fish is at an all time high but fishing is anything but fair.

programme.title: Survivorman S3 - "Episode 01"
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S2 - "Hawaii Access - Shane Dorian"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Hawaii Access - Shane Dorian
programme.desc: The Axis deer populations in Hawaii have reached plague proportions and they are in-fact invasive to this beautifully pristine archipelago of the pacific. Luckily for Mario these deer also happen to boast the best tasting venison.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild S2 - "Talking Turkey - Frank Stallone"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Talking Turkey - Frank Stallone
programme.desc: Mario links up with Frank Stallone and ventures off to Kansas in search of Eastern turkeys.

programme.title: Hunting Fish S1 - "Gran Canaria - Part One"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Gran Canaria - Part One
programme.desc: Thom hunt challenges himself to locate a rare Mirror Carp in stunning Gran Canaria.

programme.title: Hunting Fish S1 - "Gran Canaria - Part Two"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Gran Canaria - Part Two
programme.desc: Thom hunt challenges himself to fish wild Tuna in stunning Gran Canaria.

programme.title: Hunting Fish S1 - "Norway"
programme.desc: Thom Hunt challenges himself to fish for Cod in picturesque Norway in freezing conditions.

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones S1 - "Silver Kings"
programme.desc: The group of iconic anglers reunite for a week of fishing & camaraderie in Belize. Bill Klyn & Tom McGuane fish for snook, Lori-Ann Murphy & Zach Gilford go after bonefish & Michael Keaton & Tom Brokaw pursue permit & tarpon.

programme.desc: A media circus surrounds OJ Simpson as he is placed in jail for violating his bail agreement. During a body search, a man is tased and pepper-sprayed. A parole violation calls for all hands-on deck.

programme.desc: A woman is charged with possession of a controlled substance. A woman denies assaulting her husband, and two aggressive cousins threaten police and end up in isolation.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man arrested during a dangerous drug deal struggles to face jail time. Tempers flare when a man makes threats against the arresting officers. Marijuana falls out of a man’s pockets during booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A transient man tries to resist the officers in booking then serenades them with a song. A difficult inmate blames his behavior on various medical conditions, and a woman claims to be Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Jail

Officers try to convince a homeless young man that patching up his relationship with his family is better than being drunk on the streets.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An arrested man is caught on camera making a run for freedom. An addict returns to jail and tells officers that meth is controlling his mind. Humility may be the key for one man to quit his life of crime. A shoplifter calls 9-1-1 to help him get out of jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Sarasota, FL a man is sent to intake for indecent exposure. In Spokane, WA a man threatening bodily harm to himself is placed in a restraining chair. programme.desc: A man arrested on drug warrants is upset about the BBQ brisket he left on the grill. programme.desc: In Portland, OR an intoxicated male suspect is brought in for DUI. In Salt Lake City, UT a happy drunk woman is pleasantly cooperative. An emotional detainee sheds some tears while in isolation. In Las Vegas, NV a man is strapped in a restraining chair.

programme.desc: Agents of the US Customs and Border Protection pursue a vehicle. Border agents spot two undocumented people while scanning train tracks. Airport Customs detains a man when agents suspect he might be carrying more than luggage.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspicious driver takes police on a neighborhood chase. Officers are called to capture a 12-foot python hiding outside a home. Officers suspect a funny walking motorist is hiding something in his shoe.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: US Marshals are tasked with finding a young boy that has been kidnapped for ransom. A man suspected of dealing contraband is reported by his ex-girlfriends mother. Officers raid a home looking for a dangerous fugitive.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A couple gets into a fight with their in-laws when they attempt to take their baby on a 3am drive. Two suspects proclaim their innocence after walking away from a hit and run. A man is attacked by his roommate after he gets ‘too friendly’ with a woman in their home.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he’s just trying to return the vehicle to a friend. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A dispute inside a nightclub turns into a street fight. A man patrols his neighborhood ‘Old West’ style. A K-9 unit is called in to track a burglar on the run.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A prostitute tries to outrun the police during a foot chase. A man claims he can only meet women at motels since he lives with his mom. A prostitute fresh out of jail protests that he’s not trying to return to his old career.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An ex-felon threatens to kill his spouse after she announces she want to divorce him. A driver is stopped with suspicious plants in her car. A woman crashes her friends truck into a pedestrian and a tree.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E11 First Do No Harm
programme.desc: A suicidal man tries to taunt police into shooting him. Undercover officers expose an illegal operation at a pain management clinic. A woman claims she’s just a bystander to a motorcycle hit and run.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he’s selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home. A safe full of evidence is found during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. A intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he’s not trying to run away. A jealous boyfriend terrorizes his girlfriend and her parents.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect tries to elude officers by driving on a rough road. An argument over a cigarette turns ugly. Kids throw rocks from an overpass at the wrong car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect ditches his bike then tries to outrun the police. Neighbors fight about a road rage incident using rocks and a baseball bat. Suspects in a stopped car attempt to hide all the evidence against them.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E16 My Bills Won't Wait
programme.desc: A suspect calls the police and states that he wants to kill himself and any officer who tries to help him. None of the three occupants of a stopped car will admit to ownership of a bag of drugs. A man begs not to be arrested so that he can pay child support.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn. A father threatens his daughter and her boyfriend with a knife.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E18 Spiked but Still Moving
programme.desc: A suspect refuses to stop his vehicle even after the officers spike his tires. A dispute over money results in a pregnant woman being attacked. A woman asks for officers to help her rescue cats from a trailer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man on a late-night bike ride is stopped by officers for not having a headlamp. A suspect in a domestic dispute admits to hitting a woman. A man doesn’t deal with being laughed at by his neighbor in a peaceful way.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E20 Now It's Lawn Furniture
programme.desc: A traffic stop over a broken brake light turns into a foot chase. A man handles bad news by throwing his furniture out of the window. A vehicle pursuit ends with a K-9 unit’s help.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E21 Don't Make her Angry
programme.desc: A man needs police assistance when his angry ex-girlfriend crawls through his window. Police must play hide-and-seek when they attempt to execute an arrest warrant. A man is threatened with violence when he refuses to turn his car’s headlights off.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E22 And Through the Woods
programme.desc: Officers chase a fleeing suspect as he runs through the woods and into a rose bush. An elderly man puts himself in the middle of a knife fight. Two brothers disagree over letting officers search their car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E01 She Came Onto Me
programme.desc: An undercover police officer sets up a sting to buy drugs. Officers find a surprise in a suspect’s trunk. A man claims that a prostitute has kidnapped him.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police follow a car after it leaves a drug house. A police officer in Las Vegas goes undercover posing as a ‘john.’ Officers give chase when they observe a car making an illegal U-Turn.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police set up a undercover operation to bust a suspect who wants to hire a hit man to kill her husband. Unknown to her, the hit man she hired is an undercover police officer. The suspect denies doing anything wrong despite all of her crimes being caught on camera.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers get a tip and locate the suspect in a recent shooting. A woman is questioned when she is found parked alone in her car behind closed businesses. Officers respond to a call involving juveniles spray painting an electrical box.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E06 Sharp Knives and Dirty Donuts
programme.desc: A customer pulls out a knife when asked to leave the store. A man doing donuts in a motel parking lot is questioned about a love triangle. Officers are flagged down by a man who was shot at while riding his bike.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E07 No Shirt, Lots of Service
programme.desc: When approached by police, a suspect decides to take his shirt off and taunt the officers. Twin sisters ask for help when their third sister is threated by her boyfriend. An intoxicated suspect crashes his wife’s car into a light pole.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E08 You've Gotta Believe Me
programme.desc: A DWI suspect flees from police because he thinks they won’t believe his version of events. A suspect is stopped for jaywalking but when questioned she can’t keep still. A naive man leaves his car unattended for a moment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect in a traffic stop decides to handle the situation by screaming at the police. Officers have a close encounter with a suspect who admits that he has hidden contraband. A man’s clothing choices tip police off to possible criminal behavior.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect flees from police and attempts to hide contraband from them. A driver is pulled over and is literally covered in his crimes. An employee of a cell phone store attempts to scam the police and her employers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E11 A Song of Fire and Cleaning
programme.desc: The pursuit of a criminal driver ends in a fire and police rescue. Police track down an elusive suspect. A family dispute over cleaning a garage ends with the police being called.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Rather than stop, a driver decides to lead police on a high-speed chase. A woman is shot at by her ‘sugar daddy.’ A fleeing suspect dumps a suspicious liquid out of his window.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are called when two intoxicated suspects decide to have some fun and vandalize a fence. Undercover officers set up a narcotics sting at a hotel. A man is found lying naked in a parking lot.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Despite driving a large SUV and trailer, a suspect tries to outrun the police. A driver tries to hide contraband on his person. Police are called into a domestic dispute involving a husband and wife.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E15 All The World's Our Bedroom
programme.desc: Officers are called to remove a man sleeping in a parking spot at Wal-Mart. A free-spirited couple takes their relationship to their front lawn. A resident brings a knife to a meeting with his building property manager.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police officers set up a sting operation using a taxi cab in to bust prostitution. A man claims he can’t remember his ‘girlfriend’s’ name when officers suspect the woman is actually a stranger. Female undercover officers set up a sting operation to bust johns.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E17 Two Mr. Fix Its
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to flee when officers tell him they will search him. Two men get in a fight over window installation. A hotel room is filled like a clown car with multiple suspects.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect leads police on an extended pursuit throughout New Orleans. When he’s flipped off by his neighbors, a man responds by firing a gun. Police pull over a Porsche and discover it’s stolen.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E19 Make it a Large Soda
programme.desc: A motorcyclist refuses to stop for the police and later tries to escape on foot. A pedestrian is found to have a large soda cup full of anything but soda. A man calls for police help when he’s verbally attacked on a city bus.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E20 A Bag, a Bus and a Break In
programme.desc: A couple calls for help when a man breaks into their home. A school bus is involved in a hit and run accident. Officer find a one gallon bag of contraband in a suspect’s car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers break up a fight between a couple in the middle of the street. Not even a church is immune to being robbed. A dispute between neighbors involves deadly weapons.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E22 Shots in the Big Easy
programme.desc: In New Orleans, police respond to a shots fired call. A suspect peddles a bike on the wrong side of the road with his girlfriend on the handlebars. A woman reports her husband to the police when he throws her down the stairs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A couple flees a routine traffic stop. An intoxicated woman climbs a tree. Construction workers are pulled over for a hand-to-hand transaction.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A sting operation is set up to catch narcotics dealers. A man flees a restaurant without paying his four-hundred-dollar tab. A traffic stop for a tint violation leads to a felony arrest for narcotics.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E03 Gas up and Run!
programme.desc: A man is tasered twice after struggling with two deputies. A gas station fight ends in a foot chase. A deputy pulls over a pair of quarreling lovers after they run a stop sign.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Sgt. Sean Larkin showcases crime, chase, and search footage on his show.

programme.desc: Tiimi löytää kauden parhaan jadelohkareen, mutta on vaarassa heikentää sen arvoa, kun he yrittävät leikata kaikki halkeamat pois.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian poika Justin osoittaa, että hän osaa löytää jadea, kun taas Scrappy Larry, Robin ja Josh kamppailevat hinaamaan rikkinäisen autonsa Wolverinelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Huonot tulokset pakottavat Robinin ja Justinin viimeiseen yritykseen etsiä jadekiviä pelastaakseen kauden, kun taas Scrappy Larry kiirehtii muuntamaan dieselillä toimivan säiliön.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian hanke majoittaa työryhmä Jade Cityyn vaarantuu, kun saostussäiliö vuotaa juomaveteen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kylmän sään saapuessa aikaisin ja velkojen kasaantuessa miehistö työntää, vetää ja raahaa mammuttimaisen ja mahdollisesti kauden pelastavan lohkareen leirille.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun vuoden lupaavinta lohkaretta työstetään Wolverinella, Josh ja R2 kolaroivat rekka-autonsa, ja Claudia tiimineen jäävät ymmälleen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kilpailu on käynnissä, jotta Wolverinen leiristä päästään pois ennen kuin kaikki jää lumen alle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia joutuu ajamaan kiviautoa, kun hänen miehistönsä kamppailee kivistä polkua ylös Wolverinen vuorenhuipulla sijaitsevaan leiriin.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jännitteet nousevat pintaan, kun Claudia, Robin ja miehistö yrittävät saada ihmisiä ja varusteita syrjäiseen leiriinsä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia ja Robin yrittävät tehdä vaikutuksen uusiin liikekumppaneihinsa, mutta ensimmäiset päivät uudella alueellaan Bullion Creekissä ovat turhauttavia.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: 20 tonnia painavan lohkareen kuljettaminen kaivoksesta lähtevällä petollisella tiellä osoittautuu liian raskaaksi heidän vanhalle kuorma-autolleen Six packille.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: 20 tonnia painavan lohkareen kuljettaminen kaivokselta lähtevällä petollisella tiellä osoittautuu liian raskaaksi heidän vanhalle kuorma-autolleen Six packille.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Elokuun hurjan lumimyrskyn takia Claudian ja Robinin on pakko jäädä 2 Mileen, kun taas Gary ja Garon yrittävät pelastaa tilanteen ajamalla myrskyn läpi ja tuomalla heille tarvikkeita.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Robin tekee vaikean päätöksen rakkaan kaivosautonsa Six packin suhteen toisen kalliiksi tulleen rikkoutumisen jälkeen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Talven lähestyessä Claudia ajaa uupuneen miehistönsä murtumispisteeseen, mikä saa kiihkon leimahtamaan ja pakottaa Claudian viimein hyväksymään tappionsa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Uusi kaivoskausi on täynnä ikäviä yllätyksiä, mutta epätodennäköinen tapahtuma pelastaa tilanteen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh on kyllästynyt työskentelemään isälleen, joten hän perustaa oman kuorma-autoyrityksensä uudella rekalla.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Armeijan kuorma-auto hajoaa julmalla tiellä kaivokselle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Gary ja poikansa pelastavat vanhan armeijan kuorma-auton, mutta sen ajaminen kaivokselle on raakaa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Garon ja Josh menettävät Six packin hallinnan mutaisilla teillä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Justin lentää paikalle uuden vaijerisahan kanssa, mutta menettää malttinsa yrittäessään asentaa sitä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö kohtaa loputtomasti ongelmia yrittäessään leikata palan 18 metrin pituisesta linssistä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia tuo paikalle ison porauskaluston, ja hänellä on vain neljä päivää aikaa löytää paras jadepaikka, mutta hän ja Robin eivät osaa päättää, mistä etsiä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehet ottavat yhteen, kun he loppukauden kiireet pakottavat heidät työskentelemään kahdessa kaivoksessa yhtä aikaa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö irrottaa jadelohkareita J-linssistä, mutta iso ongelma tiellä uhkaa kaikkea.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun Claudia ja Robini etsivät jadea poraamalla tuloksetta, edes yhtiön geologit eivät pääse yksimielisyyteen suunnitelmasta.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia, Robin ja miehistö yrittävät saada raskaan kaluston vuorelle ennen kuin tulvivat joet katkaisevat pääsyn kaivosalueelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Ilmassa on jännitettä, kun miehistö yrittää saada raskasta kalustoa mutaiselle, lohkareiden peittämälle 120 kilometrin pituiselle polulle perustaakseen uuden jadekaivoksen vuorenhuipulle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö yrittää saada koneensa kulkemaan vyöryvien jokien yli perustaakseen uuden jadekaivoksensa vuorenhuipulle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Alan on vakuuttunut siitä, että Dynastyn alueella veden täyttämän kuopan alla on jadea.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Robin yrittää uhmata fysiikan lakeja saadakseen massiivisen uuden kasarmin Wolverinen alueelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jade Cityn porukkaa koettelee huono onni, ja jokainen keksii ainutlaatuisia ratkaisuja huonon onnen karkottamiseksi.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kaikki innostuvat, kun he vihdoin alkavat kaivaa esiin lupaavia vihreitä lohkareita, joiden miehistö uskoo olevan miljoonien arvoisia.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jännitteet nousevat pintaan, kun ulkomaiset sijoittajat piipahtavat yllättäen tarkistamaan Wolverinen kaivosalueen töitä, ja Alan yrittää rauhoittaa tilannetta.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun Wolverinen kaivoksella vihdoin löydetään lupaavia lohkareita, miehistö huomaa, että he ovat saattaneet mennä tonttinsa rajojen ulkopuolelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jännitys kasvaa, kun kaivoskauden loppu lähestyy, ja Jade Cityn miehistö haluaa löytää kallisarvoisen lohkareen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jade Cityn kaivostyöläiset yrittävät löytää rikkauksia - tarpeeksi suuren jadelohkareen, joka tekee vaikutuksen sijoittajiin - ennen kauden päättymistä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian ja Robinin testaamattomat koneet alkavat hajota raa'alla matkalla Wolverinen kaivosalueelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö yrittää ylittää tulvivia jokia matkalla kaivokselle koneet mukanaan, mutta Josh jää jälkeen ongelmallisen kaivinkoneen takia.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh jää jumiin pitkällä matkalla Wolverinen kaivokselle, kun pultit irtoavat kaivinkoneesta eikä hän voi kutsua apua.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kaivoskausi alkaa, ja vaikka jadea ei näy, rekkaonnettomuus tuo Jade Citylle onnea.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Guysta tulee Wolverinen johtaja, ja uuden työntekijän palkkaaminen uhkaa suistaa hänen tehtävänsä löytää kauden ensimmäinen jadelohkare.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Juuri kun Wolverinen miehistö tehostaa turvallisuusmenetelmiään, uusi työntekijä Jay romahtaa, mikä paljastaa heidän hätävalmiutensa säröt.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh käyttää uutta kaivinkonetta, kun taas arvottomien kivien kasa saa Claudian harkitsemaan uutta strategiaa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Alan tuo Jade Cityyn ostajaryhmän, mikä saa Claudian tiimin paniikkiin ja etsimään kauden ensimmäiset myytävät jadelohkareet.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey decides to get Buffalo involved in a D-Day paratrooper jump to commemorate the 70th anniversary of D-Day.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Buffalo's top guns, rookies and vets, go to California for aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. Cory and Mikey race to get ready for the D-Day jump.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot Scott faces his worst nightmare when a faltering Curtiss C-46 Commando engine and low fog force a scary landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Christmas is just around the corner, but Buffalo's crucial food and mail runs come to a halt.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A string of bad luck turns chief pilot Arnie's 66th birthday run into the flight from hell - and threatens to spoil his naughty birthday surprise.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mechanic Cory races against the clock to turn two short-haul waterbombers into transatlantic aircraft for the epic journey to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A charter flight falls through the cracks after the McBryans attend a wild family wedding, and an irate Joe pulls captain Justin from the Turkey test flights to do the job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: A furious Joe fights against a federal suspension that will prevent him from carrying passengers for the first time in 20 years.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: AJ and Candace get married in the Ice Castle. A frustrated Chuck tries to get the Electra to pay her way. A flummoxed Mikey tries to bake a cake for Joe's birthday.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: The Turkey crew makes the critical jump over the North Atlantic. But en route to Portugal, one crew is forced to turn back.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey - and everyone at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: When her husband quits after a blowout with Joe, Kelly is put in a terrible position. Will she stay at Buffalo - or will she go?

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head off to Coventry, England to navigate the potential purchase of an Electra turboprop to add to Buffalo's fleet of fire-fighting tanker planes.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: After her husband's acrimonious departure from Buffalo, Kelly has a confrontation that decides whether she, too, will quit.

programme.desc: Mikey goes on a treasure hunt to Venezuela for a rare CL-215 waterbomber.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT

programme.desc: A multi-stop mission to the Far North has Devan, Scott and Adam facing a series of white- knuckle obstacles.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT

programme.desc: The Electra flies to Alert, the northernmost settlement on Earth, forcing Adam and new senior manager Duane to work things out.

programme.desc: Non-stop 80s -24/7. With synth pop, soft rock, leg warmers, lycra and big hair! Classic pop that has stood the test of time.

programme.title: 80s Hit After 80s Hit!
programme.desc: Your 80s channel - 24/7!

programme.title: Stingray Remember the '80s
programme.desc: Relive the decade of perms and shoulder pads! The unmistakable synth pop sound of artists such as Michael Jackson, George Michael, and Whitney Houston, is bound to remind you of all your greatest '80s memories!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Mi Cocina by Rick Martinez! Follow along as Shahir prepares dishes from across Mexico, including juicy chicken al pastor, a beautiful whole grilled fish, quick and easy aguachile, and much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Tenderheart by Hetty Lui McKinnon! Follow along as Shahir makes craveable vegetarian dishes like Southern fried mushrooms, ingenious chocolate-eggplant brownies, charred cauliflower with sweet peanut sauce, and much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Diasporican by Illyanna Maisonet! Follow along as Shahir prepares Puerto Rican favorites like mofongo – a hearty plantain mash, crispy and delicious rice, a gorgeous rolled cake, and much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 The Cook You Want to Be
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: The Cook You Want to Be by Andy Baraghani! Follow along as Shahir prepares simple and flavorful dishes like a light citrus salad, shawarma spiced lamb chops, clams with crispy ham, and so much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 The World Central Kitchen Cookbook
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: The World Central Kitchen Cookbook by José Andrés! Follow along as Shahir prepares dishes that World Central Kitchen makes as part of disaster relief efforts all over the world, including beef rendang from Indonesia, lahmajoun from Armenia, potatoes from the Canary Island, and much more!

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: In just 30 minutes, Chef Spencer Watts whips up a fast and flavourful Lebanese Take-Out for four people.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Spencer Watts cooks an Indian takeout dinner for four in around 30 minutes, for around 30 dollars.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: If you have 30 minutes, then you have time to make Chinese take-out dinner for four people! Chef Spencer Watts cooks up a feast that costs $30.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Who doesn't love pizza night? Host Spencer Watts whips up a Quick and Easy Duo Pizza with a fresh Tomato Basil Salad.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E09 Mushrooms Episode with Chef Katie Ardington
programme.desc: Mushrooms grow by the light of the moon; in this episode, our accomplished chef-host Katie Ardington expertly exposes them to the light of day"...

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E10 Salmon Episode with Chef Natalia Machado
programme.desc: Salmon is one of the few fish worthy of its own Cook Like a Chef episode; join Chef Natalia Machado as she introduces us to its many virtues…

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E11 Lamb Episode with Chef Craig Wong
programme.desc: Chef Craig Wong loves cooking lamb, and with his expert advice, you will too!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E12 Game Episode with Chef Derek Dammann
programme.desc: Game meats are on the menu for Chef Derek Dammann in this protein-packed episode of Cook Like a Chef.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Stuffed Olives and Risotto
programme.desc: Italian host Vanessa Gianfrancesco whips up classy dishes for a gorgeous dinner party in Italy.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Every culture has its version of finger food and in Japan it’s called Izakaya! Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen prepares tapas dishes perfect for nighttime snacking.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: The key ingredient in this episode of One World Kitchen is mangoes! Host Vijaya Selvaraju uses mangoes for some classic Indian dishes.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Endearing host Pailin Chongchinant makes three popular Thai dishes: Coconut Chicken Soup, Green Papaya Salad, and the most famous, Pad Thai.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Endearing host Tyrone Edwards surprises South African-born Shameen Miller with the results of her DNA test. Shameen cooks a meal that combines her two cultures and shares it with her family.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards shocks Andrea Titus with her DNA results. Blending her two cultures onto one plate, Andrea then cooks up a delicious and revealing meal for her family.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards reveals to Laird Hercules that his DNA includes other ancestry besides Guyanese. In the DNA Dinners kitchen, he cooks up a delicious meal that combines his known and newfound cultures.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Mary Bosco is Italian, but Host Tyrone Edwards surprises her by revealing that her DNA test includes roots from other places. Mary cooks a special meal for her family that combines her two cultures.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Collard Greens, Maple Syrup, Goat Cheddar and Heirloom Cherry Tomatoes
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera prepares a frittata, rosemary skewer chicken and grilled bread salad with fresh ingredients from a local farmers' market.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Broccoli, Rainbow Chard and Herbs
programme.desc: Warm host Amanda Herrera picks up colourful produce and herbs at a farmers' market to make a delicious appetizer and tasty cold oil French fries.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Honeycomb, Shallots and Iceberg Lettuce
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera transforms fresh market ingredients into two irresistible dishes, including a one pot Lamb Curry with Honeycomb.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Patty Pan Summer Squash and Cabbage
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera grills up two dinner recipes using patty pan summer squash and cabbage that she picked up from the market.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: The secluded region of Abruzzo makes for unique Italian cuisine. Chef Michael Bonacini shows us diverse regional recipes like Rolled Meat Crepes.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Pasta, bread, pizza dough! Host Michael Bonacini makes Apulian classics like Artichoke Cheese Panzerotti.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Corn: Argentina's favourite ingredient
programme.desc: Corn is a big staple ingredient in Argentinian cuisine, and chef Natalia Machado makes tamales, corn and squash and chorizo stew, chicken in a creamy corn sauce, and then creamy corn pudding for dessert.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Argentinian chef Natalia Machado takes us on a culinary tour of Patagonia as she creates popular dishes from the area, including lamb empanadas, King Crab pie, fish in a salt crust, and Patagonian fruit cake.

programme.title: Mucho Machado
programme.desc: Chef Natalia Machado walks us through a selection of rice dishes including mushroom risotto, paella, and puffed rice cereal!

programme.title: Mucho Machado
programme.desc: Chef Natalia Machado is cooking everything corn including maiz toastado, cachapas, humitas, and her signature pan de elote y rajas!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Three Course Argentinian Meal
programme.desc: Warm host Natalia Machado makes a three course Argentinian meal that reminds her of her family.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Argentinian host, Natalia Machado, exquisitely prepares delicious dishes from Argentina including lamb two different ways.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Charismatic host Jessica McGovern whips up classic desserts from the beautiful city of Paris.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Country fair treats made right at home! Host Jessica McGovern makes tasty fair-inspired desserts like classic Funnel Cake.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Which tasty treats tantalize your taste buds? Sweet and salty ones, of course! Host Jessica McGovern shows us some of her favourites.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Nothing is more mesmerizing than outer space! Host Jessica McGovern bakes delicious desserts with a galaxy-inspired twist.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: "A" is on the menu and Chef Robert Jewell takes on this meal challenge with apricots and avocados. First up, Robert cooks a spicy roasted quail and drizzles it with some sweet apricot and calvados sauce. Next, is a meal best served cold! Robert slices up sushi-grade tuna and transforms it into a flavourful tartare, brought to life by rich avocado and refreshing lime. On the side, he adds crusty crostini with savoury soy sauce and sesame oil, the perfect complement for this meltin- your-mouth meal. For his final dish, Robert combines apricots and avocados for an unbelievably tasty dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Host Theresa Visintin picks the letter “D” in this challenge and combines two very different ingredients – dill and duck! But that’s no big dill for Theresa. For her first dish, Theresa uses dill seeds and weed to make a hearty, creamy dill pickle soup. She adds chicken broth and potatoes as her base but makes the soup extra smooth with some sour cream. She tops the soup with dill pickles to add a delightful crunch. Next, Theresa takes duck, a classic French ingredient, and gives it a French Canadian twist – duck tourtière. Using the duck fat to fry up some veggies, she adds red wine to her chicken stock and simmers the meat. Then, Theresa fills a pie crust with this delightful duck...

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Showcasing the unique flavours of endive and eggplant, Chef Lauren Gulyas receives the letter "E" for her cooking challenge. She sets sail by creating an endive salad boat, the perfect delivery vessel for her smoked trout with creÌ€me fraiche, and goat cheese with walnut appetizers. She follows up with a stuffed baby eggplant, Moroccan style! Chef Lauren sauteÌs onion and garlic with some smoky sweet paprika and a snip of savoury sage, the aromatic combination lends itself beautifully to the succulent flavour of lamb. For her grand finale, Chef Lauren prepares the pieÌ€ce de reÌsistance using both endive and eggplant.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an Italian-inspired meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: parm crusted chicken cutlets, roasted fennel, and broken cannoli

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing game day menu! Josh makes PB&J caramel corn, chicken tenders, and an Arnold Palmer, while Erica prepares crab fries, burger-themed egg rolls, and a classic Pittsburgh sandwich!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 New Orleans-Style Shrimp & Oysters
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde he creates NOLA-inspired Oysters, Shrimp Po’boys, Bananas Foster, and a Fruity Hurricane.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: The first in the season will see Catherine Bennett and her youngest daughter Sarah Jane keen to downsize from their huge 13-bedroomed house in Mullingar. They're planning to move down the road, where they also own a 3-bed bungalow that's been uninhabited for the last nine years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot faces a unique challenge in Clane, Co. Kildare.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon helps Senator Katherine Zappone and Dr Ann Louise Gilligan renovate a dilapidated hunting lodge in Brittas, Dublin.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Desperate for more space, a couple with two young daughters, who have long since outgrown their tiny cottage in Killawalla outside Westport, engage Dermot to help.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot revamps a Rathfarnham four-bed to suit the changing needs of its occupants Peter, Lisa and their twins Grace and Louise (9) live in a four-bed house in Rathfarnham, Dublin 14.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: A young couple with three children seek Dermot's help in revamping their small three bedroomed bungalow in Ballinteer Ailish and Patrick Bates are a young couple running out of space - fast!

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot knows exactly how to solve the problem but it means destroying a lot of the work the couple have already done.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts are up against the clock to revamp their 70s bungalow in Enniskerry before their first baby arrives.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot needs to create "a bungalow downstairs" incorporating a bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, living and dining room.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is normally confident about presenting a plan. But with a couple as design-literate as Greg and Siobhan, the stakes are that bit higher.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Rathcoole with Mary Moore, the design solution Dermot offers Mary is one of the most unusual and interesting he has ever conceived.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon sets out to transform people's living spaces. Before moving in to their 1940s ex-council house in Co Kilkenny, the Kirwans added a basic extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot wants to turn the house completely on its head, putting the bedrooms to the front and extending the back to include a kitchen, living and dining that leads into the garden.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Templetuohy, Co. Tipperary with Joanne and Sean Cleere who believe they need a substantial extension but Dermot doesn't actually concur.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Room to Improve starts with Margaret and Jodie Burke who plan to renovate the family home in Foxrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Pádraig Whooley and Lorraine Dufficey spent 265 thousand euros on their remote cottage at Rossmore in West Cork, they knew that - while the hilltop location was ideal - the house was far from it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Laytown, co.Meath, with a budget of 60,000 euros, Dermot's worry "is even if you took away the shoddy workmanship you'd spend the 60k, this is a really difficult one..."

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Dalkey, with a budget of 180,000 euros, he must come up with an innovative design to match their exacting requirements within the confines of an incredibly tight site.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Clontarf, with Denise and Ben who desperately want a second bathroom for their family home, but their budget is limited.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Tullow, with Tom and Lisa who want to renovate their 19th century farmhouse.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Yvonne and John live in a housing estate in Dundalk with their two children. Four years ago, they decided to buy their next-door neighbours house.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jim and Siobhan Doyle live in a beautiful old house over looking Dublin Bay in Sutton. See Dermot Bannon transform the rambling old house into a beautiful new space.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: The series begins in Cork City with our youngest and most ambitious couple yet, Meadhbh and Niall, both 27-years-old.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: After 10 successful years living in Boston, Elaine Mitchell made the decision to come back to the old sod with her earnings.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: No close neighbours, beautiful views of the Wicklow Mountains, a large vegetable patch, 10 hens, four ducks, two geese, four beehives, two dogs and three cats.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Marcus and Margaret are about to extend a two-bed cottage in Dundrum and share it with Marcus's beloved Aunt May.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: The number one criteria when buying a house is location and our fifth programme of the series is set in one of the most sought after costal parts of the country, Dalkey.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: John Rochford from Dublin and Lee Benn, originally from Limerick, have bought a house in their dream location - South Dublin's seaside suburbia, Blackrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon helps a family to transform their 70s bungalow outside Tipperary into a modern family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot goes to Cork to work with a family spanning three generations - who all have different ideas on how to improve their home.

programme.desc: Dermot Bannon tries to turn a dilapidated, woodworm infested 1930s cottage into a starter home for a Finglas family.

programme.desc: This week Dermot tackles a large Victorian terraced house in the highly sought-after Dublin suburb of Donnybrook.

programme.title: Crystal Blue Waves
programme.desc: The sights and sounds of big waves breaking along a coastal pier on a blue-sky day.

programme.title: Blue Lagoon Boat
