programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: The guys test drive Mazda's latest hatchback as Vicki unveils the long-awaited new Tesla Model 3 electric car; finding out if the Porsche Cayman still is the king of the £50,000 sports cars.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this episode of Fifth Gear Tiff Needell and Vicki Butler-Henderson visit sunny South Africa to drive everything from rally cars, to supercars to military vehicles.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff conducts a crash test to show why everyone should make sure their next car has electronic stability control. Vicki is at a motor show in Monte Carlo, where she reveals the latest Pagani hypercar and test drives the controversial Fisker Karma.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson and Tiff Needell travel to Romania to sample some of the car culture there. This includes driving some massive off-roaders, meeting a local classic car restorer, and racing a motorsport mad Mayor up the streets of his town.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff and Jason hold a knock-out tournament to see if the 570hp Mercedes SLS AMG can beat its rivals from Aston Martin, Bentley and Jaguar. Jonny meets Swedish rally legend Stig Blomquist for some ice driving lessons in the new Audi A1 Quattro.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki takes two Audi TTs to the track for a shoot-out - one has a manual gearbox, the other a semi-automatic - to see which is faster; Jason drives the Bowler Nemesis, a 500 bhp extreme off-roader designed to tackle the world's toughest rallies.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Fifth Gear guest presenter and Touring Car champion Jason Plato tests Chrysler's new 300C. Is this would-be competitor for the likes of the Mercedes E-class really a car to be taken seriously?

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell employs the help of two models to test the theory that the quicker you drive a convertible, the less your hair blows. He blasts the brand new Bentley Continental GTC up to 150mph.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson jets off to Portugal to drive the new Mazda MX5. It's the best selling sportscar in the world, but have Mazda fixed something that wasn't broken.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests Nissan's new Micra. He finds it well-made and easy-to-drive. Adrian Simpson goes in search haunted cars. He starts by being very sceptical that haunted cars can exist at all.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato gets a world's first test drive in the £380,000 Pagani Zonda F. Vicki Butler-Henderson heads to our Anglesey test track to race a Porsche 911 against the latest Lotus Exige.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out exactly how well built a Mercedes is when she crashes it, drowns it in a flood and then drives over it in a monster truck.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out if the Lotus Elise S is the best track car for novices - by giving the keys to her sister; Le Mans winner Guy Smith races the fastest van on sale today.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests the latest car to join the elite ranks of road cars capable of over 200mph includes such mouthwatering prospects as the Enzo Ferrari, the Pagani Zonda, and the Porsche Carerra GT .

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Adrian Simpson road tests Vauxhall's new Vectra. He finds it very dull to look at inside and out. The 2.2 litre petrol engine feels slow. On the plus side it's better than the model it replaces.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff pits Renault's latest hot hatch the stripped out and hardcore Megane R26.R, against a Caterham CDX. Jonny brings us his verdict on the brand new Ford Ka. Tim delves into the world of car crime, to make us more aware of what criminals look for.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson makes some noise in TVR's new T350, a £40,000 coupe which promises 175mph, and 4 seconds to 60. Plus we find the ultimate bargain car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out if an old Daihatsu Charade is the toughest car you can buy; Tom Ford drives the Honda CRV, the SUV that claims to be greener than a MINI Cooper.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki finds out which is quickest - an old Vauxhall against a new one. Jonny Smith and Tom Ford contest one of motor sport's oldest and most gruelling events, the Exeter Trial. Tiff Needell goes to France to drive the new Audi A3 Cabriolet.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff heads to Anglesey to see what's quickest; a Smart Brabus or Mini Cooper S when they get pitched head to head in the Fifth Gear shoot out.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: The most frequently asked motoring question is "What's quickest?" Fifth Gear go to a special test track on the Isle of Anglesey with six of the most desirable performance cars of the moment.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson and Tiff Needell drive some of the best cars made in Britain today. They also celebrate Britain's amazingly diverse and fertile sports car industry.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of we're literally taking Fifth Gear to new heights and celebrating the most spectacular challenge petrol-heads have ever invented.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki finds out what's quickest in the Shoot-Out feature - the brand new Audi S5 or the BMW 335i; England rugby star Kyran Bracken is given some circuit driving tuition from Jason Plato; Jonny Smith tests a potential revolution in city transport

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests the latest version of the car that is perennially voted one of Britain's favourite cars - the Land Rover Defender. Jonny Smith celebrates Ferrari's 60th Birthday.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Adrian Simpson test drives Volvo's new off-roader. He concludes because of their attention to safety, the environment and the family-size accommodation Volvo have created a different kind of 4x4.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato test drives the sexiest car of the moment, the Aston Martin V8 Vantage Roadster, whilst Jonny Smith tests the hire car that James Bond drove in Casino Royale, the new Ford Mondeo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson tries to crack 150mph as she makes an attempt on the Blindfolded Land Speed World Record. Can Vicki hold her nerve and set a new record for driving in a straight line?

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford and Jonny Smith enter a demolition derby in two unlikely vehicles, Reliant Robins. Tiff Needell tests the latest Porsche 911, the GT3RS. Vicki Butler-Henderson drives the new Vauxhall VXR8.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell test drives the new Aston Martin V8 Vantage, billed as the most desirable sportscar in the world. Jon Bentley reveals definitively whether expensive petrol is worth the extra cash.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jon Bentley investigates how hitting a motorway crash barrier can make your car fly through the air. Jason Plato gives cricketer Kevin Petersen the chance to drive the Lamborghini Gallardo Spyder.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki meets 12 times Motor Trials champion and British motorcycling legend Dougie Lampkin. Jonny investigates another way of making cash from old cars. Jason takes the Ford Focus RS in the first TV drive of Ford's awesome new hot hatch.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato tests the new 911 Turbo, Vicki Butler-Henderson presents a high speed crash test, and Tom Ford drives a new Lamborghini.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell drives Suzuki's hot hatch, the Swift Sport; Tom Ford drives the awesome Aussie supercar, the Vauxhall Monaro; Vicki Butler-Henderson fulfils a lifetime ambition and drives a racing truck.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell sets out to see whether it's possible to drive along the A537 from Macclesfield to Buxton, the most dangerous road in Britain, safely in the first Porsche Cayman in the country.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki is the first journalist in the world to drive the astonishing £150,000 Gibbs Aquada, an amphibious car that breaks the mould. Vicki tests it out on the open road and the ocean wave.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny and Jimmy head to S. Korea to discover how they made world-beating cars in just a few years. Jimmy revisits the original Bentley Blower and Jason hits the track in an Alpine A110.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell heads to LA to check out the latest car trend to take the USA restomodding. Its the art of sympathetically restoring classic cars to modern standards, while retaining their original charm and Tiff's behind the wheel of LA's best examples

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason and Jonny face off in the series' first van versus pick-up challenge. The team test the Cupra Ateca, the first car from Seat's sports division, and Jimmy fits a custom exhaust.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff is joined by German motoring legend and 'Queen of the Nurburgring' Sabine Schmitz for a head to head battle between our two favourite sports cars of the last year - the BMW M6 and Porsche 911.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell are joined by Ayrton Senna's nephew, Bruno Senna, to conduct their fastest ever track test. They hold a thrilling race between the brand new Porsche 911 Turbo S and two supercar rivals from Noble and Nissan.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason tests a brand new model from British track-car specialists Westfield. Tiff has rounded up the newest American muscle cars. Guest presenter Robert Llewellyn heads to Portugal to test a revolutionary electric car from Nissan.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff talks to David Coulthard about the new Mercedes SLS AMG, Jason heads to Italy to drive the cutting edge £300,000 Ferrari 599 GTO. Jonny meets up with Vicki for a dogfight between the Land Rover Discovery and brand-new Toyota Land Cruiser.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell hold a high octane track test of three brand new super glamorous convertibles from Audi, Maserati and Mercedes. Vicki Butler-Henderson races wheel to wheel with World Superbike hotshot Chaz Davies

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this episode of Fifth Gear Tiff Needell and Vicki Butler-Henderson take part in a unique car v plane challenge. Nigel Lamb is the current Red Bull Air Race champion, which makes him the airborne equivalent of Lewis Hamilton.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason Plato raids the Fifth Gear archives to look at the multitools of the motoring world, cars that can go anywhere and do just about anything - 4x4s.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Where are your children safest - in a 4x4 or an MPV? Fifth Gear finds out with a spectacular 'worlds first' crash test between a Landrover Discovery and Renault Espace.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: An exclusive insight into America's most glamorous supercar club, based in an underground bunker at a private jet airport, Tiff Needell and Jason Plato race the BMW M3 against the Audi RS4.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests a comprehensive selection of the latest hot hatches including the new and long-awaited Ford Focus RS. He rules out the MGZR, the Mini Cooper S and the Renault Clio Cup.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson, Tiff Needell, Tom Ford and Jason Plato take their pick from the best new cars launched in 2004. They pick an overall winner, Fifth Gear's car of the year.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out exactly how well built a Mercedes is when she crashes it, drowns it in a flood and then drives over it in a monster truck.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests the brand new Ford Fiesta. Vicki Butler-Henderson and Tiff Needell challenge each other on two wheels. Jonny shows us three great, affordable cars. Jason Plato takes the Porsche 911 GT2 out on the track.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson, Adrian Simpson and Tom Ford visit the Paris motor show. They look at many of the new models revealed there including the Porsche Cayenne and Bentley Continental GT.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of Fifth Gear Adrian Simpson will be asking what makes a celebrity car valuable and what doesn't, and he'll be meeting the people who buy them and collect them.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests Nissan's new Micra. He finds it well-made and easy-to-drive. Adrian Simpson goes in search haunted cars. He starts by being very sceptical that haunted cars can exist at all.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of we're literally taking Fifth Gear to new heights and celebrating the most spectacular challenge petrol-heads have ever invented.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson makes an unprecedented attempt to hit 200mph in an A1 Grand Prix car. Tom Ford and Jonny Smith take the seven newest hot hatches on sale and decide which is best.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny Smith goes on a rather expensive road trip - in a £250,000 Rolls Royce Phantom. Tom Ford is testing the new Porsche Cayenne Turbo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason pits two almost identical Porsche Caymans. Jonny is enjoying some Spanish sun in the brand new Audi A5 cabriolet. Tim investigates the accuracy of the combined economy cycle. Jason helps Matthew Pinsent find his perfect car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Adrian Simpson road tests Vauxhall's new Vectra. He finds it very dull to look at inside and out. The 2.2 litre petrol engine feels slow. On the plus side it's better than the model it replaces.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford takes puts the Grande Punto Abarth through its hot hatch paces. Tim Shaw finds out if it's possible to save huge amounts of money by servicing your car yourself. Bruno Senna joins the programme as a special guest presenter.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson was the only British journalist invited to test drive Ferrari's new race car, the F430 Challenge. Tom Ford takes an exclusive one-off look into the secret world of the Maybach.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki takes two Audi TTs to the track for a shoot-out - one has a manual gearbox, the other a semi-automatic - to see which is faster; Jason drives the Bowler Nemesis, a 500 bhp extreme off-roader designed to tackle the world's toughest rallies.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is at Anglesey for another Fifth Gear shoot-out. This time it's super chic superminis, the BMW Mini One against the Fiat 500. Jason Plato delivers his verdict on the Nissan Skyline now re-badged as the GT-R.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Adrian Simpson test drives Volvo's new off-roader. He concludes because of their attention to safety, the environment and the family-size accommodation Volvo have created a different kind of 4x4.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell employs the help of two models to test the theory that the quicker you drive a convertible, the less your hair blows. He blasts the brand new Bentley Continental GTC up to 150mph.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim Shaw tackles the horrible subject of car tax. Jason Plato meets Moto GP star James Toseland in another feature where Fifth Gear makes a sports stars dream come true. Tom Ford demonstrates the potential safety issues of convertibles.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests the latest version of the car that is perennially voted one of Britain's favourite cars - the Land Rover Defender. Jonny Smith celebrates Ferrari's 60th Birthday.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki is the first journalist in the world to drive the astonishing £150,000 Gibbs Aquada, an amphibious car that breaks the mould. Vicki tests it out on the open road and the ocean wave.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Adrian Simpson road tests the new Hyundai Coupé. It was massively praised by motoring journalists on its launch it Italy. They even likened the £14,000 South Korean car to a mini Ferrari 456.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell tests the new Lamborghini Murcielago and finds it slightly less inspiring than Lamborghinis of old - slightly less of a raw supercar.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Fifth Gear guest presenter and Touring Car champion Jason Plato tests Chrysler's new 300C. Is this would-be competitor for the likes of the Mercedes E-class really a car to be taken seriously?

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out which is the fastest - the Renault Twingo GT or the Fiat Panda 100HP. Tiff Needell and Jason Plato go head to head. This time it's small coupes as the Porsche Cayman comes up against the new BMW 135i Coupe.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Adrian Simpson will be in Surrey for the The Mini World Show, a 45th Birthday Party for the Mini - attracting masterpieces from all over the world.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is finding out if progress has been made by Mitsubishi, as she races a classic Evo 6 against the very latest Evo 9.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In an astonishing series of experiments Tiff Needell and Vicki Butler-Henderson find out just how dangerous ordinary items can be, and how you can best keep them under control in our cars.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In the series finale we bring you the ultimate supercar battle when we pitch the awesome McLaren F1 against the almighty Enzo Ferrari. Jason Plato tries his hand at flying a stunt plane.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Fifth Gear presenter Jonny Smith is granted access-all-areas to Kia's top secret test facility in the Californian desert where he investigates the lengths manufacturers go to in the quest for ever greater reliability.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson and Tiff Needell travel to Romania to sample some of the car culture there. This includes driving some massive off-roaders, meeting a local classic car restorer, and racing a motorsport mad Mayor up the streets of his town.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell heads to Le Mans, to race in the European version of legendary American race series NASCAR - the world's most popular motorsport.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason is joined by ex-Ferrari F1 driver Mika Salon to pit the brand new £100,000 Mercedes C63 AMG Black Series against its key rival from BMW. Tiff celebrates the iconic Ferrari F40's 25th birthday with a track drive of one of the best in the world.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki goes behind the scenes of famous Italian car designers Pininfarina - the people who have shaped every single Ferrari of the last 50 years. Tiff is joined by British rally star Mark Higgins in a test of two new SUVs with supercar power figures

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff is joined by German motoring legend and 'Queen of the Nurburgring' Sabine Schmitz for a head to head battle between our two favourite sports cars of the last year - the BMW M6 and Porsche 911.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny and Vicki review two mighty 4x4's in one of the shows muddiest Dog Fights. Elsewhere, the team hit the road in the all-new Alpine A110 to find out what's changed since the first incarnation hit our streets back in 1961.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jonny and Jimmy head to S. Korea to discover how they made world-beating cars in just a few years. Jimmy revisits the original Bentley Blower and Jason hits the track in an Alpine A110.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell blasts through France's champagne region in Aston Martin's latest convertible, Vicki Butler-Henderson acts as umpire in a race between two England cricket stars.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: The GR Yaris is an iconic Hot Hatch of the modern era. To see if it earns this credit, Jason Plato puts it up against two equally iconic classic cars.

programme.desc: As high schools wind to a close for summer, dangerous pranks abound – including the theft of a police car.

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe.

programme.desc: A gifted psychic (or a gifted conman) helps find the missing witness in an organized-crime case.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of an escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator for lack of evidence.

programme.desc: Andy and Nick investigate a torched van. It belongs a street priest who's been receiving death threats.

programme.desc: When a child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal.

programme.desc: After months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick - then Andy - go missing.

programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex-convict.

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: There's a possible connection between a missing woman and one of the division’s most distressing cases.

programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean tries to cut the grass in the garden but finds it impossible.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: When invited to dinner by Mr Bean, it’s probably best to take your own sandwiches.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean's car has broken down and he is late meeting Irma at the opera.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket becomes annoyingly inconsolable when Scrapper goes missing.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: A puzzling puzzle has Mr Bean truly puzzled.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean finds that cleanliness can be a filthy business.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes a superhero in an attempt to stop a cunning thief.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E16 Merger of the Big Five — Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey are forced to use their strongest monsters to take down the Five-Headed Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E17 Brothers in Arms — Part 1
programme.desc: Kaiba and Noah duel for full control of KaibaCorp, but Noah's revelations and constant manipulation of the playing field complicate things for Kaiba.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E18 Brothers in Arms — Part 2
programme.desc: Noah's Shinato's Ark puts Kaiba in a difficult position, as he scrambles to find a winning strategy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E19 Brothers in Arms — Part 3
programme.desc: Kaiba regains control of the duel, but Noah brings a brainwashed Mokuba out to hinder his plans. After finally breaking through to Mokuba, Kaiba tries to embrace his brother before Noah, jealous over their close relationship, turns them to stone.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E20 Noah's Final Threat — Part 1
programme.desc: Enraged at Noah's cruel games, Yugi takes over for Kaiba and duels Noah with only 400 life points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E21 Noah's Final Threat — Part 2
programme.desc: Yugi's efforts to win the duel are further complicated by Noah, who turns all of his friends into stone statues, leaving Yugi feeling alone and without hope.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E22 So Close Yet So Far
programme.desc: Gozaboro Kaiba reveals himself and plans to virtualize the entire world to create a digital kingdom. With Noah's unlikely aid, Yugi and the others must escape while fending off memories from the past.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E23 Burying the Past — Part 1
programme.desc: Using Mokuba's body, Noah escapes and sets the virtual world to self-destruct. But Mokuba's kindness breaks through his heart, and he tries to set the others free. Meanwhile, Kaiba duels Gozaboro, who summons a seemingly unstoppable monster—Exodia Necross.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Asuka stays behind to fight Yuri while Sora and the others go on ahead. Yuri uses a different deck and fights Asuka, who tries to reach out a helping hand to Yuri. That's when Yuri reveals the real reason why he does what he does.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya comes across Ruri, who is still under the control of the Doctor's parasites. Yuya attempts to fight off Ruri, made harder when Serena joins the fight. Yuto decides to take control and face the two girls.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E125 Rise Of The Parasites
programme.desc: Yuya and Yuto are struggling in their battle against Ruri and Serena and their Parasite Queen. The Doctor attempts to take control of Yuya using a parasite as well, but that only awakens the rage inside of Yuya once again.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Leo Akaba reveals to Yusho Sakaki how the four dimensions came to be.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Leo continues his story about how Zarc destroyed the original world. Leo's daughter Ray used four cards to stop Zarc and split the world into the four current worlds. He then reveals the true nature of Yuya, Yuzu, and the Arc Area Project.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Leo begins his final plan to fuse the dimensions and revive his daughter Ray. Reiji and Yuya team up to take down Leo, with Yuya resolving not to let Zarc be revived. Yusho realizes that even this is part of a larger enemy's plan.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Leo's plan gets further and further to completion, which causes the evil inside of Yuya to emerge once more. Yusho stops the duel and realizes that Zarc's influence is hovering over everything, including Yuya's other counterparts.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yugo and Yuri being their duel, with Zarc's shared influence forcing them into battle. To stop Zarc's revival, Kaito and Edo join the battle as well to hold back Yuri's powerful Fusion Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E105 Put to the Test: Part 1
programme.desc: The hunt for the Mythyrian Numbers leads our heroes to the peak of a perilous mountain where Kite’s skills are put to the test by a dragon-wielding Number Guardian!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E106 Put to the Test: Part 2
programme.desc: Kite faces his toughest challenge ever when a powerful Number Guardian threatens to take possession of his Galaxy-Eyes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: After an ancient statue is unearthed, Yuma finds himself between a rock and a furry place when he discovers that there’s more to Girag than meets the eye – like a red nose and whiskers!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E108 A Sea of Troubles: Part 1
programme.desc: It’s rough waters ahead for Yuma and his friends when the search for the last two Mythyrian Numbers leads them to an ancient ruin that lies beneath the bottom of the ocean!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E109 A Sea of Troubles: Part 2
programme.desc: The battle beneath the ocean reaches new depths of danger when Shark comes face to face with the Number Guardian, Abyss!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E110 A World of Chaos: Part 1
programme.desc: Earth and Astral World are under attack! Yuma and Astral are the only ones who can stop it, but saving their planets may come at the ultimate price…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E111 A World of Chaos: Part 2
programme.desc: The battle between our two heroes and Number 96 comes to a shocking conclusion that leaves only one person standing!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Someone’s stealing memories, and the Super Secret Numbers Club are going to find out who! But when the hunters become the hunted, Yuma’s friends quickly realize that they need help from an exterminator!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Yuma and Trey team up to take down a bugged out Barian who likes to munch on memories! Can Yuma and Trey swat down this winged menace before he swoops in to drain their brains?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E114 Tentacles of Terror: Part 1
programme.desc: With Vector’s patience for failure fading fast, Mr. Heartland begs for a final chance to beat Yuma! Desperate to deliver, Heartland deploys his most dangerous duelist to date, a treacherous Barian armed with toxic tentacles!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E115 Tentacles of Terror: Part 2
programme.desc: Shark and Quattro struggle to keep their heads above water as they battle the Barian duelist from the deep, Chironex!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E116 Now or Never: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma’s all set to travel across the stars to save Astral, but an unexpected pest pops by to plunder Yuma’s plans!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E24 Burying the Past — Part 2
programme.desc: ami Marik destroys the computers in the control room, disabling the controls for the self-destruct mechanism, which turns the situation desperate. Meanwhile, Kaiba defeats Gozoboro Kaiba, and he and Yugi rush to the exit before the virtual world explodes. Noah erases Gozoboro's files and releases his mind, and finally makes peace with his family, and prepares for the destruction of the virtual world.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E25 Back to Battle City — Part 1
programme.desc: Yugi and the others arrive at KaibaCorp Island and The Battle City Finals resume. To decide who will duel whom, the four duelists--Yugi, Joey, Kaiba, and Marik-- face each other in a four-way duel in the Duel Tower.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E26 Back to Battle City — Part 2
programme.desc: The four-way duel continues with Joey determined to duel Marik in order to save Mai while Marik and Kaiba both intend to face Yugi. Meanwhile, Ishizu reflects on her past.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E27 Back to Battle City — Part 3
programme.desc: With the conclusion of the four-way duel, the match-ups for the semi-finals are determined — Joey will duel Marik while Yugi will be facing off against Kaiba.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E28 The Darkness Returns — Part 1
programme.desc: Marik brings Joey and himself to the Shadow Realm, where each duelist's heart is linked with his monsters, suffering the pain that the monsters feel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E29 The Darkness Returns — Part 2
programme.desc: Marik's duel tactics eat away at Joey's deck and his life points. Joey's comeback strategy, however is hindered by Marik's new monster on Joey's side of the field.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E30 The Darkness Returns — Part 3
programme.desc: With life points dropping and his monsters unable to attack, Joey summons a monster that proves to be his saving grace, prompting Marik to unleash Ra.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E31 The Darkness Returns — Part 4
programme.desc: Despite surviving Marik's onslaught, Joey is weakened by the shadow game's effects and succumbs just as he is about to win the duel. Yugi struggles to find hope after losing his best friend to the Shadow Realm.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E32 Clash in the Coliseum — Part 1
programme.desc: The second duel of the semi-finals begins with Yugi dueling Kaiba for the second spot in the grand final and the chance to duel Marik. Kaiba draws Obelisk on his first turn, but Yugi thwarts his attempts to summon it with Lightforce Sword.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E33 Clash in the Coliseum — Part 2
programme.desc: Kaiba and Yugi compete to summon their monsters to the field, but each is hindered by the other's strategies.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E34 Clash in the Coliseum — Part 3
programme.desc: Kaiba is able to summon Obelisk the Tormentor, to the field, putting it at odds with Yugi's own Slifer the Sky Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E35 Clash in the Coliseum — Part 4
programme.desc: With the destruction of both their monsters, Kaiba and Yugi are presented with a vision of the High Priest's legendary battle against the Pharaoh. Kaiba believes this to be a mere illusion, but Yugi knows that it is a vision of the past. The duel continues with Kaiba and Yugi attacking with their signature cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E36 Clash in the Coliseum — Part 5
programme.desc: Kaiba gains a lead in the duel when he summons three Blue Eyes White Dragons. Yugi's hopes of winning come to an end, but receives some encouragement from Joey and stays strong in the game. Meanwhile, Joey's dreams and the ongoing duel cause Joey to awake.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E37 Clash in the Coliseum — Part 6
programme.desc: Kaiba's final move forces the duelists to use only three cards, forcing to use the best cards in the decks to win the duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E38 Battle for the Bronze — Part 1
programme.desc: Tired of Kaiba's constant ridicule, Joey challenges Kaiba for third place in the Battle City tournament.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E39 Battle for the Bronze — Part 2
programme.desc: Joey manages to gain one of Kaiba's strongest cards to help him advance in the duel. Meanwhile, Téa – possessed by the good half of Marik's soul – fights Yami Marik for control of the Millennium Rod.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E40 Battle for the Bronze — Part 3
programme.desc: After defeating Joey and taking third place in the tournament, Kaiba plans to destroy the Duel Tower and bury his past forever. Ishizu and Mokuba convince him otherwise, and he gives Yugi one all-powerful card that could give him a chance to defeat Marik in the final duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E41 The Final Face Off — Part 1
programme.desc: The final duel of Battle City begins. Yami Marik quickly turns it into a shadow game and sets it up so that if he or the Pharaoh loses, their host's soul will be destroyed. Yugi convinces the Pharaoh not to worry about him and to keep dueling to save Mai, Bakura and the good Marik. Yami Marik quickly discards his Winged Dragon of Ra to the graveyard, planning to revive it. Yugi manages to summon Slifer the Sky Dragon using his three Knights.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E42 The Final Face Off — Part 2
programme.desc: Marik uses Ra's effect to destroy Slifer and revives it once again to attack Yugi. Yugi plays the card Kaiba gave him, Fiend's Sanctuary, to stop Marik's attack. He then uses Multiply in order to summon Obelisk the Tormentor and devastate Marik.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E43 The Final Face Off — Part 3
programme.desc: Marik's good half possesses Tea again and begs Yugi to destroy him along with his evil side,but he eventually weakens and begins fading away as his dark half loses life points. Yugi and the Pharaoh become hesitant to duel, not wanting to harm the good Marik. As he fades away, Marik appears to an unconscious Odion, thanks him for taking care of him and apologizes, wishing that he could take back his cruel actions. In a cliffhanger, Odion is revealed to have been awakened by Marik's apology.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E44 The Final Face Off — Part 4
programme.desc: Yugi continues fending off Marik's attacks, holding out until he has the cards he needs to defeat Marik. Finally, he summons Dark Magician and Dark Magician Girl and uses them to activate Ragnarok – a spell card with the ability to destroy all the monsters on Marik's field, including The Winged Dragon of Ra that he fused himself with. (The card actually negates and removes all cards Marik controls, at the cost of banishing all monsters to the graveyard that Yami Yugi has.) But Yami Marik claims that if Ra is destroyed (which will leave the good Marik with only 1 life point), then the good Marik will be too weak to resist the power of the Shadow Realm, and will consequently lose his soul....

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E45 The Final Face Off — Part 5
programme.desc: Odion tries to get the good Marik to resist his evil half. As a result, Yami Marik becomes angered, and attacks Odion with the Millennium Rod, which weakens Odion even more. Odion doesn't give up, despite Ishizu's protests. As Marik continues his onslaught (which begins to injure Odion), Odion tells Marik's good side that together, they had conquered his evil half before, and that they could do it again. Then, he tells the good Marik that since Yami Marik was created by the good Marik's hatred, he has the power to destroy him. As Yami Marik raises the Rod to deliver the final blow, the good Marik disappears from the field, and begins fighting against Yami Marik, who struggles for control...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E46 One for the Road
programme.desc: Yugi and the gang escape from the island in time, but they are forced to leave Kaiba and Mokuba behind. The brothers get away just as the island explodes using the Blue-Eyes White Jet. Yugi's group heads back to Domino City, where they say their farewells and go their separate ways.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E47 Looking Back and Moving Ahead
programme.desc: Téa shows Serenity around the city, to all the sites of the important duels of the Battle City Tournament, while Joey duels Yugi to get his Red-Eyes Black Dragon back. Téa eventually meets up with Yugi, and they head off for further adventures.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 A New Evil, Part 1
programme.desc: The three Egyptian God Cards are stolen! A terrifying new villain emerges! And, as if things couldn’t get any worse, real monsters begin to appear around the world, terrorizing the population!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S04 : E02 A New Evil, Part 2
programme.desc: With Seal of Orichalcos, not only can Gurimo have ten monsters on the field at once, but each creature receives a power boost!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S04 : E03 Legend of the Dragons
programme.desc: Not only is our world on the brink of apocalypse, but an entire domain of monsters is also on the verge of collapse!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Confusion abound when enemies become friends... and friends become enemies! Yugi and the gang set off on a cross-country trek when they’re asked for help from a one-eyed former foe!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba returns to Duelist Kingdom for a showdown against Pegasus! Wielding his newest whacked-out Toon terrors, Pegasus is ready to repeat his previous victory against Kaiba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only does Alister’s mighty fiend gain attack points for every fiery monster on the field, but it can also take control of Kaiba’s monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya's opponent is Isao Kachidoki from the Ryozanpaku School in the second round of the Maiami Championship.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: When a mysterious visitor threatens to throw the Championship into chaos, Declan moves in to uncover who they are and soon finds himself facing off against a merciless mercenary!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 The Master of Magicians, Part 2
programme.desc: It’s Dark Magician versus Dark Magician! However, while Yugi only controls one Dark Magician, Arkana has three residing in his deck! Though outnumbered, Yugi will never give up, as long as he believes in the heart of the cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 The Master of Magicians, Part 3
programme.desc: To counter Arkana’s Dark Magician, Yugi pulls a rabbit out of his hat: Dark Magician Girl! It’s the battle of the sexes to determine the true master of magicians!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E14 Playing With a Parasite, Part 1
programme.desc: The trickster Weevil Underwood spins a web of lies to bait Joey into a lopsided duel! Weevil secretly infests Joey’s deck with a parasite that prevents Joey from summoning strong monsters! Without the support of his most powerful beasts, what chance does Joey have against a monster that even Yugi didn’t dare face at Duelist Kingdom: Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth!?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 Playing With a Parasite, Part 2
programme.desc: Joey swats Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth only to have Weevil let loose the ferocious Insect Queen, the crown jewel of insects that grows in strength for every creepy crawler it cannibalizes! Will Weevil’s royal ravager swarm Joey into submission?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.desc: Yuya comes across Ruri, who is still under the control of the Doctor's parasites. Yuya attempts to fight off Ruri, made harder when Serena joins the fight. Yuto decides to take control and face the two girls.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V
programme.sub-title: S03 : E125 Rise Of The Parasites
programme.desc: Yuya and Yuto are struggling in their battle against Ruri and Serena and their Parasite Queen. The Doctor attempts to take control of Yuya using a parasite as well, but that only awakens the rage inside of Yuya once again.

programme.desc: Leo begins his final plan to fuse the dimensions and revive his daughter Ray. Reiji and Yuya team up to take down Leo, with Yuya resolving not to let Zarc be revived. Yusho realizes that even this is part of a larger enemy's plan.

programme.desc: Leo's plan gets further and further to completion, which causes the evil inside of Yuya to emerge once more. Yusho stops the duel and realizes that Zarc's influence is hovering over everything, including Yuya's other counterparts.

programme.desc: Yugo and Yuri being their duel, with Zarc's shared influence forcing them into battle. To stop Zarc's revival, Kaito and Edo join the battle as well to hold back Yuri's powerful Fusion Dragon.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A chauvinistic coach doesn't want a female wide receiver on his junior-high football team.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps Commander Michaels to deal with flashbacks of Vietnam; he also tries to convince her to go to therapy. Mark deals with his fear of flying.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A veterans' support group becomes a lifeline for Commander Michaels, who continues to deal with post-traumatic stress disorder. Meanwhile, she discovers that her son David came into the emergency room due to an accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A pastor must follow a council's decision to fire some staff at the school because they're not Christian.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark attends his high school class reunion and learns that some memories are bittersweet for his old friends.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The problems of the handicapped are addressed when an amputee joins a crusade after a false fire alarm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mr. Zelinka is a beloved teacher who is being forced to retire because he's old. Jonathan and Mark know that he would prefer to continue teaching.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The parents of two Vietnamese children come to America to look for them after a ten-year separation.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: After having been scarred in a fire, an actress becomes a counselor at a summer camp for blind children.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark believes that God has turned Jonathan into a dog. Meanwhile, he must contend with a runaway kid and the kid's scatterbrained mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Jonathan shows three men what will happen in the future if the Earth continues to be ravaged by pollution. One of the men is an energy official another is a farmer and the third one is the President.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: In the series opener, we meet Jonathan Smith, a probationary angel who has been sent to help people on Earth. He befriends residents at a retirement home. The administrator at the home has a brother named Mark who is suspicious of Jonathan.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps the residents of Havencrest, when they learn that the retirement home is going to be sold.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help aging movie heroes to stand up to a street gang known as Satan's Helpers. They persuade a young boxer not to throw a big fight when the gang tries to bully him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a young country singer who is hoping to follow in her mother's footsteps. Next, they help a widow mourning her late husband.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan must find a way to help Deke, a college football star whose dreams of reaching the pros are shattered by a tragic motorcycle accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A construction tycoon believes he's King Arthur and his estranged son wants him declared incompetent.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan has been hired to look after the kids of a movie star who never has time to spend with his family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark has fallen in love with an attractive woman, but Jonathan receives news about her from higher up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark must help an Amerasian girl facing racial prejudice when she goes to live with her father's family in the United States.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help a heartless used car salesman reconsider his actions on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark investigate a gang of drug smugglers after an old friend of Mark's has disappeared.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan attempts to fan the flames of love between a woman and her ex-husband's best friend. But his efforts backfire when he falls for the woman himself.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark is in a state between life and death when he's critically injured in a car accident. Jonathan takes Mark back to childhood to give him a second chance to tell his grandfather how much he loves him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan steps in when a heart condition sidelines a promising basketball player's dreams.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Scotty is a lovelorn quadriplegic with a successful law practice. And Jonathan is happy to play cupid.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A greedy banker and a good-hearted bum switch places. The bum dies, but the banker is now infused with love and generosity.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark meet a child star whose fame is spoiling her rotten, destroying her family and taking away her childhood.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan encourages residents in a neighborhood to unite against a cold-hearted developer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Lizzy MacGill is a horse trainer's young daughter who elopes with Garth Armstrong, a privileged man.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help Lizzie. The new bride has cancer and she is pregnant.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark and Jonathan become counselors at a camp for children with cancer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are helping patients at Camp Good Times in different ways. But a father still refuses to deal with his son's illness.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An aspiring actress wants to be accepted for who she really is, not in the image her well-meaning dad tries to transform her into.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark has been tricked into selling his soul in order to save a little girl's life. But the Devil has another agenda: acquiring Jonathan's soul.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Factory workers ignore ground-water contamination, even though it is making their children sick. As a result, Jonathan takes drastic measures to force them to face the facts.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A minor-league baseball team never wins, so Jonathan and Mark set out to help them. They also come to the aid of an elderly vendor who has been kicked out of the stadium.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The teenage daughter of Mark's friend tries to find her biological mother. It may tear the family apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark connect a young blind woman with a disfigured artist.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's friend Scotty is on hand to provide legal assistance. He defends the young artist with a facial deformity who has been accused of assaulting a blind girl.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark go to work at a football team. They learn that one of the players has been getting drugs from the team doctor.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A homeless boy wishes that someone would love him.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan kuulee ääniä, jotka kutsuvat häntä tulen ja jään planeetalle.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistö joutuu kahden Nietzschean ylpeyden väliseen taisteluun vangitessaan vihamielisen, joka väittää, että hänen ylpeydellään on liukuvirran kartta.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Väärä käänne liukuvirran poistumisen jälkeen lähettää Andromedan Prolon-järjestelmään. He pelastavat Escape-podin tietyiltä katastrofeilta, mutta ylpeys haluaa sen takaisin.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistö etsii kadonnutta nietzscheläisten siirtokuntaa ja löytää toisen miehistön, joka on salaa auttanut heitä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr vakuuttaa nietzscheläiset siitä, että hän on Drago Musevenin reinkarnaatio.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Viesti keräilijältä lähettää Dylanin pelastamaan panttivangin ja löytämään Kansainyhteisön laivaston jäännökset.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Citizen Eight yrittää poistaa Dylanin Andromedan komennosta.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistön on pysäytettävä maailman laivanrakentaja ennen kuin hän aloittaa uuden hyökkäyksen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kaksi Nietzschean sisarusta ovat vastakkainasettelussa Aseesta, joka voi poistaa korkeammat aivotoiminnot.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr palaa liittyneenä Kerääjiin ja vaatii entisiltä miehistötovereiltaan aikojen reittiä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Seurauksena on panttivankitilanne, kun miehistö kohtaa Tyrin.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Väärä käänne liukuvirrassa johtaa Andromedan vankilan mellakkaan.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistö palkattiin pelastamaan prinsessa pahamaineisesta lainsuojattomat, mutta pian paljastuu, että hän yritti paeta murhaa isänsä kädestä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kerääjät hallitsevat nyt Kansainyhteisöä ja panevat Andromedan miehistön oikeudenkäynti.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda löytää biopanssarilähetyksen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kokeellinen verhoutumislaite pudottaa Dylanin vaihtoehtoiseen universumiin.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda joutuu kahden aluksen väliseen sotaan, johon liittyy kuolemaan johtava tauti.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Abyss on tartuttanut Beka. Miehistön on löydettävä keino pelastaa hänet.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kun osa miehistöstä vangitaan, Harper joutuu työskentelemään Patriarkan aikasillalla.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Tri Gemman vakooja ilmestyy Andromedalle yrittäessään varastaa tähtikartan.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kun Rommie muuttuu liian tunteelliseksi, alus katkaisee hänen pääsynsä diagnostiikan suorittamiseksi.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda pelastaa aluksen, joka palaa rauhanneuvotteluista Magogin kanssa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Magogin hyökkäyksellä on vakavat seuraukset. Andromeda tuhoutuu, Trancen ja Dylanin oletetaan olevan ainoat eloonjääneet, ja Dylan pakenee ikiaikojen reittiä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan päätyy Seefraan, jossa taikauskoisella väestöllä ei ole teknologiaa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka jätetään Seefraan Andromedan varastamisen jälkeen, ja Dylanin on todistettava, että alus on hänen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kävi ilmi, että Doyle on Harperin rakentama androidi, joka sisältää Rommien ydinohjelmoinnin.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka voittaa palkinnon radio-DJ:ltä, saa tietää totuuden Seefrasta ja löytää Meethus-kaavion.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Alkuperäisen Kansainyhteisön tiedemies ilmestyy, kiinni ajan silmukassa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Flavin palaa, mikä sytyttää jengisodan, ja auttaa Dylania kehittymään Paradinina.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Seefrasta löydetään tunneleita, joiden kautta voi päästä kahdeksalle muulle Seefra-planeetalle.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kun vanha mies tapetaan, Beka, Rhade ja Harper ovat pää epäiltyjä ja joutuvat oikeuteen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Rhade johtaa kapinallisia taistelussa Seefra-5:n sotapäällikköä vastaan.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan saa selville, että Bekan poikaystävä oli oikeasti Drago Musevini, ja hän käytti Bekan DNA:ta luodakseen nietzscheläiset.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka ja Rhade joutuvat koetukselle, joka joko antaa heille suuren rikkauden tai ajaa heidät hulluuteen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Samalla kun Harper yrittää pelastaa Seefra-järjestelmän, vakooja hiipii Andromedalle ja hyökkää Bekan kimppuun.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Seefran vilkkuva aurinko yritetään korjata, mutta Trance korvataan kaksoisolennolla.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kun Dylan loukkaantuu vakavasti laboratoriossa tapahtuneessa räjähdyksessä, hän matkustaa erilaisten vaihtoehtoisten todellisuuksien läpi.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Rommie rakennetaan uudelleen auttamaan Seefra-järjestelmän evakuoinnissa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan, Rhade ja Beka työskentelevät yhdessä pelastaakseen Trancen Methus-2:lta ja Harperin kenraali Burmalta.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistö pääsee lopulta pois Seefra-järjestelmästä ja saa selville, että Dylan on viimeinen Paradine.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Viimeinen taistelu New Systems -kansainyhteisön pelastamiseksi alkaa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Mustan aukon lähelle jäänyt kapteeni Dylan Hunt joutuu palkkasoturien pelastusaluksen jäljille ja huomaa, että hänet on jäädytetty ajassa 300 vuodeksi.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan löytää avaruusaseman, joka on täynnä lapsia, jotka uskovat, että hänen tehtävänään on tuoda rauha tappamalla heidän vihollisensa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromedan miehistö opettelee yhä työskentelemään yhdessä, kun Restorersit hyökkäävät heidän kimppuunsa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda sekaantuu Than-planeetan ja nietzscheläisen siirtokunnan väliseen riitaan.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Liukuvirta lähettää Andromedan ajassa taaksepäin juuri ennen Kansainyhteisön kaatumista. Miehistön on puututtava asiaan säilyttääkseen historian.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Mustan aukon ansiosta Dylan voi kommunikoida entisen morsiamensa kanssa 300 vuotta taaksepäin.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan on vangittuna vankiplaneetalla, ja hänen on järjestettävä pako, kun hänen miehistönsä yrittää järjestää oman pelastuksensa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kastalialaiset nousevat Andromedalle viimeistelläkseen uuden kansainyhteisön peruskirjan. Kun johtaja löydetään kuolleena, Tyr on pääepäilty.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka saa tietää, että hänen isänsä entinen liikekumppani myy erittäin riippuvuutta aiheuttavaa huumetta.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda löytää sisaraluksensa Pax Magellanicin. Paxin miehistö on 300 vuotta vanha... mutta ei ole ikääntynyt päivässä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper saa tiedon lahjan kuolevalta Perseidiltä, mutta huomaa, että Perseidiä etsi palkkionmetsästäjä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan pidätetään diktaattorin salamurhasta 300 vuotta sitten.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromedaan nousee Consensus of Partsin, myyttisen mekaanisen yhteiskunnan, lennokki. Aluksi drone on ystävällinen, mutta yrittää pakottaa aluksen liittymään Konsensukseen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Gerentex on palannut, ja hän vaatii Trancen ja Harperin apua uudessa suunnitelmassaan: Tarn-Vedran löytämisessä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan yrittää tuoda rauhaa kahteen eri Nietzschean ylpeyteen saattamalla toisen prinsessan järjestettyyn avioliittoon toisen prinssin kanssa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Rommien avatar rakastuu Gabriel-nimisen sota-aluksen avatariin. Gabriel yrittää tartuttaa Rommieen viruksen, joka lähettää suunnitelmansa sota-alukselle.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka vie Andromedan Tarn-Vedraan, mutta pitkä aika liukuvirrassa aiheuttaa sivuvaikutuksia. Niiden torjumiseksi Beka alkaa käyttää Flashia ja jää pian koukkuun.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Vanha muisto Andromedalta aktivoituu vahingossa, mikä lähettää hänet tehtävään ja jättää Dylanin miehistön ohella kykenemättömäksi kumoamaan komennon.
