programme.desc: Dylan löytää avaruusaseman, joka on täynnä lapsia, jotka uskovat, että hänen tehtävänään on tuoda rauha tappamalla heidän vihollisensa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromedan miehistö opettelee yhä työskentelemään yhdessä, kun Restorersit hyökkäävät heidän kimppuunsa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda sekaantuu Than-planeetan ja nietzscheläisen siirtokunnan väliseen riitaan.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Hätäkutsuun vastaaminen johtaa miehistön hakemaan Bekan veljen, joka on nykyään Wayist, ja hänen ystävänsä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Mustan aukon ansiosta Dylan voi kommunikoida entisen morsiamensa kanssa 300 vuotta taaksepäin.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan on vangittuna vankiplaneetalla, ja hänen on järjestettävä pako, kun hänen miehistönsä yrittää järjestää oman pelastuksensa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kastalialaiset nousevat Andromedalle viimeistelläkseen uuden kansainyhteisön peruskirjan. Kun johtaja löydetään kuolleena, Tyr on pääepäilty.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda löytää sisaraluksensa Pax Magellanicin. Paxin miehistö on 300 vuotta vanha... mutta ei ole ikääntynyt päivässä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr syöksyy Eureka Maru -aluksella maahan Nietzscheanin planeetalla ja menettää muistinsa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper saa tiedon lahjan kuolevalta Perseidiltä, mutta huomaa, että Perseidiä etsi palkkionmetsästäjä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan pidätetään diktaattorin salamurhasta 300 vuotta sitten.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Gerentex on palannut, ja hän vaatii Trancen ja Harperin apua uudessa suunnitelmassaan: Tarn-Vedran löytämisessä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan ja pastori Bem auttavat rauhanomaista yhteiskuntaa vastustamaan mahdollisia orjakauppiaita, mutta heidän on oltava varovaisia.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan yrittää tuoda rauhaa kahteen eri Nietzschean ylpeyteen saattamalla toisen prinsessan järjestettyyn avioliittoon toisen prinssin kanssa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Rommien avatar rakastuu Gabriel-nimisen sota-aluksen avatariin. Gabriel yrittää tartuttaa Rommieen viruksen, joka lähettää suunnitelmansa sota-alukselle.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Vanha muisto Andromedalta aktivoituu vahingossa, mikä lähettää hänet tehtävään ja jättää Dylanin miehistön ohella kykenemättömäksi kumoamaan komennon.

programme.title: Apache Rose
programme.desc: Old Western Movie from 1947 starring Roy Rogers directed by William Witney: Apache Rose - Roy is an oil prospector. His efforts to get drilling rights on an old Spanish land grant are countered by gamblers from an off-shore gambling boat determined to control the land (and oil) themselves.

programme.title: Sugar Colt
programme.desc: In order to avenge a friend and to fulfill his last wish, Rocco has to find out what happened to an army corps that has mysteriously disappeared. He therefore puts on the disguise of a doctor and starts investigating in a somewhat uncomfortable town.

programme.title: Three Lead Dollars
programme.desc: Rudy returns home to revenge his father's death, fighting local bandits.

programme.title: Daniel Boone, Trail Blazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers to Kentucky, but must fight Shawnee Indians who have been convinced by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land.

programme.title: A Few Bullets More
programme.desc: Billy starts as an innocent outlaw protecting his mother but soon becomes a ruthless killer. When love gives him hope for change, Pat Garrett, a fatherly friend, helps him try to turn his life around. Yet fate drags Billy back into violence, and Garrett is ultimately credited with his death.

programme.title: Mackenzie's Raiders EP01-04
programme.desc: Colonel Mackenzie, commander of the 4th Cavalry Regiment at Fort Clark near Brackettville in Kinney County in southwest Texas during the 1870s, receives secret orders from President Ulysses S. Grant and Secretary of War William W. Belknap to stop bandits from crossing the Rio Grande into the United States, or from returning to Mexico.

programme.title: Five Guns West
programme.desc: Shalee Jethro (Dorothy Malone) helps her father run a desert stagecoach station.

programme.title: China 9, Liberty 37
programme.desc: The railroad hires a condemned killer to murder an uncooperative rancher but the assassin fails to deliver, prompting the railroad men to go after him instead.

programme.title: Four Fast Guns
programme.desc: A gunslinger rides into Purgatory, claiming to be the town tamer they hired—though he killed the real one. For $500, payable to a widow of his victim, he takes on the town's wheelchair-bound crime boss. The outlaw fights to free the town while facing three hired killers sent to eliminate him, testing his resolve and his skill as lawman-for-hire.

programme.title: God Is My Colt
programme.desc: A Army agent goes undercover to clean up corrupt Langford City full of Mexican outlaws.

programme.title: A Town Called Hell
programme.desc: A group of Mexican revolutionaries murders a town priest and a number of his christian followers. Ten years later, a widow arrives in town intent to take revenge from her husband's killers.

programme.title: Singing Guns
programme.desc: Notorious stagecoach robber Rhiannon is unintentionally appointed as deputy when he saves the sheriff's life and must wear two hats between his new job that he enjoys and his old occupation that he misses.

programme.title: The Legend of the Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The sole surviving Texas Ranger (Klinton Spilsbury) of an ambush arranged by outlaw leader Major Bartholomew "Butch" Cavendish (Christopher Lloyd) returns to fight back as a great masked western hero, The Lone Ranger.

programme.title: The Son of Zorro
programme.desc: In imperial Mexico, nobleman Don Ricardo secretly fights as the Son of Zorro against corrupt Governor Leblanche. When rebels ambush a weapons transport, killing Don Herrera, Ricardo rescues his daughter Conchita and hides her, fueling a revolution for justice and freedom.

programme.title: Tequila aka Fuzzy the Hero
programme.desc: Tequila and Bobo hit the little town of Chedron intending to rob the local bank whose owner, De Koven, is trying to freeze out all the ranchers in the area by the simple expedient of foreclosing on the mortgages his bank holds on their land.

programme.title: Stitched Love
programme.desc: Isabel has it all going well for her as a student, sister, and daughter until finding out the man she loves leaves her in a traumatic state.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: A woman's seemingly perfect life falls apart when she catches another woman in the arms of her fiance. Things get worse when she is kidnapped but all is not as it seems.

programme.title: The Hangout S5 Ep5
programme.desc: The Hangout returns for its fifth season with a group of opinionated, social media-savvy millennials who debate controversial topics on love, sex, friendship, and more.

programme.title: Find Her & Marry Her
programme.desc: When Kennedy's friend advices him to stay away from "city girls", he throws away his relationship to meet a girl from the village, but soon finds himself in over his head.

programme.title: I Killed, You Killed
programme.desc: A couple accidentally kills two people in one night and are traumatized by what they've done. They eventually distrust each other, leading to an inevitable end.

programme.title: Business Men
programme.desc: In a bid to make some extra cash and impress the family of his beloved, David unknowingly gets involved with some nefarious characters leading up to a major police investigation.

programme.title: Joy Ride
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. An Uber driver picks up a female passenger who has stolen a large sum of money from a rich psychopath. When he realizes this, he must decide whether to turn her in or become an accomplice as he soon starts to like her.

programme.title: The Choice You Made
programme.desc: Jessica’s frustration with her reckless brother Stanley reaches a breaking point when he falls for Jasmine, a fiery young woman with a notorious road rage incident in her past.

programme.title: Sincerity
programme.desc: Successful model, Britney, hires Adora as her personal stylist, but their professional relationship soon deepens into a genuine friendship. As trust builds, Britney entrusts Adora with a long-held, shameful secret. Meanwhile, Adora finds herself entangled in a complicated love triangle but when she confides in the wrong person, betrayal sends their worlds spiraling, threatening their bond and exposing the secrets they fought to protect.

programme.title: AMC Music Moments - Playlist 454
programme.desc: AMC presents music from the latest African artists

programme.title: Make A Move
programme.desc: An ex-convict gets pulled back into her old ways when she takes on a job that leads to the murder of an innocent man. Things get further complicated when she finds herself involved with his son who is out seeking revenge.

programme.title: The Missing Heirloom
programme.desc: A very expensive family heirloom goes missing and now Detective Lazarus must find it before he loses his own life.

programme.title: Scars Ep 1
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Scars Ep 2
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.
A serial killer is on the loose and with time running out, Sam, the lead investigator on the case, will stop at nothing to catch them before they commit their next murder.

programme.title: Twisted Emotion
programme.desc: Newly married Angel, starts to believe her life is boring and her marriage unsatisfying when her ex-boyfriend, and first love, comes back into the picture. She decides to reconnect with him for old times sake but long-buried feelings begin to resurface.

programme.title: Excuse Me
programme.desc: The life of a successful journalist gets complicated when her love life is entangled in a news story that can make or break her career.

programme.title: AMC Red Carpet - Everything Is New Again
programme.desc: AMC Red Carpet moments brings you exclusive red carpet interviews with Nollywood stars at the premieres of top Nollywood movies and other industry events such as award ceremonies.

programme.title: The Love I Prayed For
programme.desc: When kind-hearted Ella gets a new job as the housekeeper to a man with an unfaithful girlfriend, she takes it upon herself to help him with his broken heart but where will that leave her own relationship?

programme.title: Loving A Con Man
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. Zed, who goes by many names, is a perfect con man, making women fall for him and taking their money. Things start to change when he meets Tabitha, a successful novelist with a fiancé abroad. Zed believes she is the perfect victim for a con until he starts to fall for her.

programme.title: Billionaire Husband or Nothing
programme.desc: Evelyn must do all she can to find out why she sabotages her happiness just when she is about to get her "happily ever after".

programme.title: Unintentional Murder
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. Christian and Olivia, a married couple, are torn apart when Olivia catches Christian having an affair with her younger sister, Sophia. This revelation leads to fatal results, but it is soon discovered that things are not quite what they seem.

programme.title: My Burden
programme.desc: The demise of a couple comes after their daughter gets kidnapped by a sex trafficking ring. They both have different ideas on what to do to bring her home successfully.

programme.title: AMC Movie Talk S7 - Tayo Faniran
programme.desc: Brand new season with A list Nollywood celebrities! Join us every week on the AMC couch as we talk to the biggest movers and shakers in the buzzing industry. We are putting you in the know with all things in African and Nollywood cinema actors, actresses, directors, producers, classic cinema and soon to be blockbuster hits it's all here on AMC Movie Talk.

programme.title: The Housekeeper's Daughter
programme.desc: A housekeeper and her boss decide to play matchmaker between her daughter and his son but plans go awry as an unforeseen chain of events and perhaps a sprinkling of fate bring about totally unexpected results.

programme.title: 30s, Single & Bored Ep1
programme.desc: Set in Lagos, Nigeria, the series tells the story of single and married women in the city. It explores how they perceive and view each other, which has led to unspoken conflicts between the two groups. One group believes itself superior to the other due to its status.

programme.title: 30s, Single & Bored Ep2
programme.desc: Set in Lagos, Nigeria, the series tells the story of single and married women in the city. It explores how they perceive and view each other, which has led to unspoken conflicts between the two groups. One group believes itself superior to the other due to its status.

programme.title: Imperfection
programme.desc: A man struggles to deal with a nagging wife while she also finds difficulty keeping up with his nonchalance. But a balance must be struck if they'll make marriage a success.

programme.title: In The Pursuit of Love
programme.desc: In his quest to find true love, a young CEO decides to disguise himself and hide his true identity. He meets a female who challenges his whole idea of love and hustle. Will this be his final bus stop?

programme.title: AMC Movie Talk S7 - Tayo Faniran
programme.desc: Brand new season with A list Nollywood celebrities! Join us every week on the AMC couch as we talk to the biggest movers and shakers in the buzzing industry. We are putting you in the know with all things in African and Nollywood cinema actors, actresses, directors, producers, classic cinema and soon to be blockbuster hits it's all here on AMC Movie Talk.

programme.title: My Bosses
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. Esther is stuck in a complicated love triangle between two men, Josh, a past love, and Ade, his fun, mischievous friend, both of whom happen to be her new bosses.

programme.title: Raindrop
programme.desc: A young single mother, down on her luck, seeks refuge with her friend who takes her in. Jealousy soon rears its ugly head and the close friendship between the women begins to deteriorate.

programme.title: The Awakening
programme.desc: Cynthia is a single mother, haunted by bad dreams which she believes prevents her from finding love. She seeks help from a prophetess on the advise of her friends but soon finds out that she has been deceived.

programme.title: Entanglement
programme.desc: After years of being broke and looking for a job, a man has a chance encounter that lands him a well-paying job, but this threatens to jeopardise his relationship with his girlfriend who has been by his side through thick and thin.

programme.title: Becoming Mrs Eze
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. When Tatiana accepts Eze's marriage proposal, her friends and family believe she has chosen wrong due to the fact that he is considered unrefined and broke, and Eze's family believe that Tatiana is a city girl that is not good enough for him. Will Tatiana and Eze's love be strong enough to withstand all the judgement?

programme.title: Twisting Knives
programme.desc: AMCOP Exclusive Movie. A young lady who believes she is in an incredibly happy marriage with her husband, finds out, just before his death, that he had cheated on her for years and had kept a second family away from her. Her misery is compounded when she finds out that her mother-in-law had knowledge of her husband’s other family. Bitterness eats at her as she believes everyone knew about her late husband’s treachery and she decides to twist knives in their hearts so they too will feel the pain of betrayal.

programme.title: Public Yard
programme.desc: Following the lives of a group of young people living in a face-me-I-face-you estate. Toke is constantly putting pressure on Femi for a better life, from him getting a better job, to having children and even for him to stop flirting with his friend, Chioma.

programme.title: One More Word
programme.desc: An aspiring actress struggles between her desire and her fears, as she has a hard time completely trusting the man she loves, not helped by the fact that he is desired by others.

programme.title: AMC Music Lounge S7 - Dwin The Stoic
programme.desc: AMC Music Lounge returns for its seventh season bringing you some new interviews, new live performances, fun musical games, and many more from legendary and emerging artistes.

programme.title: Super Sheroes
programme.desc: A cop, a lawyer, and a hacker form a team dedicated to securing justice for the oppressed and poor citizens. Their passion takes a new turn when an old friend becomes a perpetual victim of domestic violence and spousal abuse.

programme.title: Private Matters
programme.desc: When swinging couple, Angela and Michael, move into a new neighborhood, their promiscuous lifestyle becomes a sick charade and spins out of control.

programme.title: Scars Ep 3
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Scars Ep 4
programme.desc: Rubby is a singer who has a promising future in the world of music. Unfortunately, her biggest secret may be discovered when a journalist comes sniffing around. Behind that bombshell lies stories of trafficking, abuse, scams, and abandonment.

programme.title: Reform
programme.desc: Two detectives are forced to team up with a sinister criminal to save the daughter of an important man. Can they put their differences aside for the mission?

programme.title: Fighting Caravans
programme.desc: Clint Belmet (Gary Cooper) is a frontier scout with his hands full in this 1931 Paramount Pictures version of Zane Grey's novel. He's helping guide a wagon train across the country, fighting off various attacks on the way, and falling for his lovely Felice (Lily Damita). Belmet's grizzled companions think he should leave the woman alone, but it gets lonely out on the trail, and Felice's charms are hard to resist. Featuring such notable character actors of the period as Ernest Torrence, Tully Marshall, and Fred Kolher, this vintage Hollywood Western still packs a wallop!

programme.title: Fighting Caravans
programme.desc: Clint Belmet (Gary Cooper) is a frontier scout with his hands full in this 1931 Paramount Pictures version of Zane Grey's novel. He's helping guide a wagon train across the country, fighting off various attacks on the way, and falling for his lovely Felice (Lily Damita). Belmet's grizzled companions think he should leave the woman alone, but it gets lonely out on the trail, and Felice's charms are hard to resist. Featuring such notable character actors of the period as Ernest Torrence, Tully Marshall, and Fred Kolher, this vintage Hollywood Western still packs a wallop!

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: An unholy alliance! Marking the feature film debut of one of Hollywoods most influential and widely referenced auteur directors, Sam Peckinpah, The Deadly Companions centers on a redemptive journey to escort a funeral procession through dangerous Indian Territory. Featuring fine work from a top-notch cast that includes the inimitable Maureen OHara at the height of her illustrious career, Peckinpahs first foray into film provides a promising glance into the energetic and violent nature of his iconic later works.

programme.title: Neath Canadian Skies
programme.desc: It's the mounties versus claim jumpers in this drama from Golden Gate Pictures. Based on an action-packed novel by James Oliver Curwood and directed by B. Reeves Maynard (Undersea Kingdom, The Phantom Empire), the film features an outstanding cast of Poverty Row regulars, including Russell Hayden, Inez Cooper, Cliff Nazarro, I. Stanford Jolley, and Kermit Maynard. For movie buffs: Cinematographer Marcel Le Picard began his career in the silent era and finished with exactly 200 credits!

programme.title: Born to Battle
programme.desc: Cyclone Tom Saunders starts a ruckus in a Chinese laundry and has to go before a judge. Unable to pay his fine, he is bailed out by a local cattle rancher and agrees to do 30 days' work for him. It's not too long before he becomes enmeshed in a war between rustlers and outlaws.

programme.title: Brothers of the West
programme.desc: Tom Tyler plays Tom Wade, a range detective whose brother has been accused of robbery and murder. Wade has only one clue to prove his brothers innocence: a set of unusual tire tracks. This film was directed by Sam Katzman, who later became known as Jungle Sam for his association with a variety of jungle thrillers, and then as a master of all exploitation genres, from teen horror to flying saucer flicks!

programme.title: Sitting Bull
programme.desc: A cavalry officer sympathetic to the wronged Sioux tribe fixes a meeting between Chief Sitting Bull and President Grant but a dishonest Indian Agent and a hateful General Custer test the Sioux's patience, threatening to derail the peace-talks. Directed and co-written by Sidney Salkow; starring Dale Robertson, Mary Murphy, J. Carrol Naish. Also, look for legendary character actor Iron Eyes Cody as Crazy Horse.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: Pat Gallagher and his sidekick Stoney Crockett are Secret Service agents in the Old West, dispatched by the government to investigate crimes threatening the young nation. In General Delivery, the G-men crack a government swindle. Starring Russell Hayden, Jackie Coogan

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: In Gypsy Traders, a band of gypsies settles down in the Montana Territory to take advantage of the copper stakes they've made in the region. In the nearby town of Bender, a group of shady locals believe the settlers should be stripped of their rights and take the matter to court. When it looks like the judge is going to rule for the gypsies, the outlaws kidnap him and lock him in the local jail.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: In Safe Crackers, Pat and Stoney are ordered to break up a safe cracking gang preying on Colorado banks handling government silver bullion. Starring Russell Hayden, Jackie Coogan.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men
programme.desc: Pat Gallagher and Stoney Crockett are Secret Service agents in the Old West, dispatched by the government to investigate crimes threatening the young nation. In this episode, the G-Men go to Denver to investigate a silver fraud. Starring Russel Hayden, Jackie Coogan.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Quick Hide the Railroad
programme.desc: Kate uses her charms to keep Homer Bedloe from catching the train to Pixley. Uncle Joe Carson: Edgar Buchanan. Betty Jo Bradley: Linda Henning. Kate Bradley: Bea Benaderet. Bedloe: Charles Lane. Sam Drucker: Frank Cady. Also starring Pat Woodall and Jeannine Riley. Created by Paul Henning. Episode first aired in 1963.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 The President Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: President of the railroad comes to visit the Shady Rest hotel with the intention to terminate the Cannonball's service. Uncle Joe Carson: Edgar Buchanan. Betty Jo Bradley: Linda Henning. Kate Bradley: Bea Benaderet. Sam Drucker: Frank Cady. Also starring Pat Woodall and Jeannine Riley. Created by Paul Henning. Episode first aired in 1963.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Is There a Doctor in the Roundhouse
programme.desc: Railroad CEO Norman Curtis breaks the Cannonball's throttle lever, threatening the success of the Shady Rest Hotel's annual jamboree. Uncle Joe Carson: Edgar Buchanan. Betty Jo Bradley: Linda Henning. Kate Bradley: Bea Benaderet. Sam Drucker: Frank Cady. Norman Curtis: Roy Roberts. Directed by David Alexander.Series created by Paul Henning. Episode first aired in 1963.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Courtship of Floyd Smoot
programme.desc: Kate's intentions are mistaken when she tries to help Floyd Smoot regain his confidence after being slighted by the woman he loves, a bride he had ordered by mail! Uncle Joe Carson: Edgar Buchanan. Betty Jo Bradley: Linda Henning. Kate Bradley: Bea Benaderet. Sam Drucker: Frank Cady. Floyd Smoot: Rafe Davis.Directed by Sherman Marks. Also starring Pat Woodall and Jeannine Riley. Series created by Paul Henning. Episode first aired in 1963.

programme.title: Adventures of Annie Oakley

Also starring Judy Nugent, Forrest Taylor, and Denver Pyle. This entertaining western adventure series aired from 1954-1957. Cowboy star Gene Autrey was an executive producer for the show, which was nominated for a Primetime Emmy Award in 1955.

programme.title: Adventures of Annie Oakley

programme.desc: Choctaw looks to inherit the ranch of the murdered Sam Forbes, but Elaine, a previously unknown niece, appears, making Annie suspicious as the men fall for her seemingly delicate nature. Cowboy star Gene Autrey was an executive producer for the show, which was nominated for a Primetime Emmy in 1955.

programme.title: Adventures of Annie Oakley

Annie Oakley: Gail Davis, Deputy Craig: Brad Johnson, Tagg Oakley: Jimmy Hawkins. This western adventure series aired from 1954-1957. Cowboy star Gene Autrey was an executive producer for the show, which was nominated for a Primetime Emmy in 1955.

Annie Oakley: Gail Davis, Deputy Craig: Brad Johnson, Tagg Oakley: Jimmy Hawkins. This western adventure series aired from 1954-1957. This entertaining western adventure series aired from 1954-1957. Cowboy star Gene Autrey was an executive producer for the show, which was nominated for a Primetime Emmy in 1955.

programme.title: Adventures of Annie Oakley

Annie Oakley: Gail Davis, Deputy Craig: Brad Johnson, Tagg Oakley: Jimmy Hawkins. This western adventure series aired from 1954-1957. Annie Oakley: Gail Davis, Deputy Craig: Brad Johnson, Tagg Oakley: Jimmy Hawkins. This entertaining western adventure series aired from 1954-1957. Cowboy star Gene Autrey was an executive producer for the show, which was nominated for a Primetime Emmy Award in 1955.

programme.title: Code of the Fearless
programme.desc: Fred Scott plays a lawman who goes undercover to expose a dangerous gang of criminals in this action-packed drama. He also has time to sing three songs: Cactus Pete, Gonna Ride, and Heres Romance. Screenwriter Fred Myton would go on to write such offbeat features as Nabonga, and Border Phantom.

programme.title: In Old Cheyenne
programme.desc: Roy Rogers plays a newspaper reporter sent to Cheyenne to investigate a reputed troublemaker. While on the scene, he discovers who the real bad guys are, and sets out to right some wrongs. Also starring Roy's usual sidekick George 'Gabby' Hayes, plus Joan Woodbury, and George Rosener. This Republic Pictures western was helmed by director Joseph Kane (The Undersea Kingdom, Dakota) and features two musical numbers: 'Bonita' and 'Linda Flor'.

programme.title: Arizona Bound
programme.desc: The Rough Riders are called upon to help save a stagecoach line. From 1941, starring Buck Jones and Tim McCoy, plus Horace Murphy and Luana Walters. Directed by Spencer Bennett.

programme.title: Vengeance Valley
programme.desc: The sons of a Colorado cattle baron, one biological and the other adopted, resent one another and fight for control of their father's cattle empire.

programme.title: Raiders of Red Gap
programme.desc: Bob's Playin' A Mystery Hand... He's Marked For Death By Killer Bullets As Gunfire Echoes Over The Plains! After one of his ranch hands is killed when a gang attacks his ranch, Jim Roberts joins forces with his neighbor in an effort to fight off the Bennett Cattle Co., a company looking to rob them of their land. Things get increasingly dangerous as the company hires Butch Crane, a professional killer, to stop them. Directed by Sam Newfield (Racing Luck (1935), Go-Get-Em, Haines (1936)), Raiders of Red Gap stars Robert Livingston (The Three Mesquiteers (1936), Larceny on the Air (1937)) as Rocky (Lone Rider) Cameron and Al St. John (Billy the Kid Trapped (1942), Border Feud (1947)) as...

programme.title: Desperadoes of the West
programme.desc: A group of ranchers, led by Colonel Arnold and Ward Gordon, are drilling an oil well but getting fierce opposition from an unknown gang of outlaws. Eastern promoter J.B. Dude Dawson is behind the gang as he is out to prevent the co-op members from striking oil before their lease expires, so he can secure the property for his company. When Ward, with the help of Arnold and his daughter Sally, arranges for a new driller to be brought in, the replacement man is killed and one of Dawson's men takes his place.

programme.title: Colorado
programme.desc: Theres trouble out west! Its the Civil War and the Union needs troops back east to defend itself. Roy Rogers stars as Lieutenant Jerry Burke, who is sent to investigate why the returning troops are being stalled in Colorado. Also starring Gabby Hayes, Pauline Moore, and Milburn Stone, this film is action packed with a turn you wont see coming!

programme.title: Land of Hunted Men
programme.desc: A band of outlaws is terrorizing a town in the West. Leave it to Ray Crash Corrigan and his Range Busters to ride in and save the day. This film marked the return of Corrigan to the famous series; he had appeared in the first sixteen movies but left for a brief hiatus following 1942's ARIZONA STAGECOACH. This was the 21st of 24 movies in the Range Busters series. Produced between 1940-1943, the Range Busters were a huge financial success for Monogram Pictures.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori is hosting a 90210 themed party and wants to create some classic Beverly Hills appys.

programme.title: The Love Club: Sydney
programme.desc: When Sydney reconnects with her ex and joins a Half Marathon he is running, she asks the Love Club to help.

programme.title: Love Map
programme.desc: A self-assured relationship columnist is sent on assignment with a prickly tour guide to Florida.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Sparks fly between an interior designer and a handsome pilot who finds homes for rescue dogs.

programme.title: Love on Trend
programme.desc: A fashion blogger gets a new number and steps into a glamorous life, but falls for her predecessor’s ex.

programme.title: The Song to My Heart
programme.desc: An organic tea shop owner helps a music sensation write lyrics for a new solo album.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: After 73 errors about firefighters in her last romance novel, Jo's publisher, Diana, insists on weeks of research for her next book by training at a military boot camp run by her navy seal brother.

programme.title: Love is a Piece of Cake
programme.desc: A baker develops a budding romance with a client's brother while trying to save her cake shop from developers.

programme.title: The Great New Wonderful
programme.desc: The Great New Wonderful weaves five stories against the backdrop of an anxious and uncertain post-9-11 New York City.

programme.title: The Suspect
programme.desc: Beth is wrongly accused of murdering her husband. With the help of an insurance investigator and her stepdaughter together they find the real killer.

programme.title: Maria My Love
programme.desc: A young woman named Ana is struggling to deal with her mother's death and her father's mistakes. In an effort to feel better, she reconnects with her half-sister Grace, (Lauren Fales) and, inspired by a new boyfriend (Brian Rieger), sets out on a quest to find someone to help. Though excited and hopeful when she meets an eccentric woman named Maria (Karen Black), she soon discovers Maria is a compulsive hoarder, and is swept up in a situation more emotionally and morally complicated than she had expected to find. Inspired by a true story.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop owners despise each other but begin to fall in love while sending each other messages on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Love at Sunset Terrace
programme.desc: A girl tries to play matchmaker for her widowed father when a woman rents one of his rooms.

programme.title: My Terrorized Teen
programme.desc: When her daughter is tormented by high school mean girls, one mother must stop it before it becomes deadly…

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki investigates what looks to be an evil imaginary friend, and discovers a child with telekinetic powers.

programme.title: A Lethal Lesson
programme.desc: High school teacher Lauren is accused of an affair by a student, putting her job and life in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Great New Wonderful

programme.title: Time Capsule
programme.desc: After many years, a group of friends reunite at the summer camp of their youth, which is on the verge of being sold off. When reliving their past joys, loves and sorrows, they open a time capsule that brings old tensions to the surface and inspires some newfound relationships.

programme.title: Sweetheart Con
programme.desc: Heartbroken over her parents' breakup and recovering from a car accident, Jane becomes increasingly suspicious of her mother's charming new boyfriend.

programme.title: The Joneses Unplugged
programme.desc: With their relationship under strain, a young couple decides to ditch the distractions of technology in order to reconnect to one another.

programme.title: Sugar Baby Murder
programme.desc: A new executive assistant to a business tycoon learns that a life of luxury can come at a deadly price.

programme.title: Love You to Death
programme.desc: A prosecutor must work on a case which reminds her of her childhood, when her mother was killed by her alcoholic father.

programme.title: Mediator
programme.desc: A family counselor in the missing children's division becomes a mediator between the living and the missing.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki finds that a ghost seeking revenge is actually being summoned forth by his Celtic witch mother.

programme.title: Nash
programme.desc: This coming of age documentary chronicles the life of NBA All Star Steve Nash as he tries to navigate his way through the somewhat toils of professional sports while trying to leave a lasting legacy on and off the court.

programme.title: Time Capsule
programme.desc: After many years, a group of friends reunite at the summer camp of their youth, which is on the verge of being sold off. When reliving their past joys, loves and sorrows, they open a time capsule that brings old tensions to the surface and inspires some newfound relationships.
